title: SOCIAL MEDIA VA – Instagram Reels Editor & Automation Specialist
description:
SOCIAL MEDIA VA – Instagram Reels Editor & Automation Specialist

Part-Time | Long-Term | Remote

---

ABOUT THE ACCOUNT

We run an Instagram account (22K followers) supporting couples through the season of early parenthood — the relationship strain, the identity shifts, the beautiful hard work of staying connected while raising babies. The content is warm, psychologically grounded, and genuinely helpful. Our audience is engaged and growing.



The face of the account is transitioning to a licensed psychologist and couples therapist. You'll be helping bring her voice and expertise to life on Instagram.

---

WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Video Editing (this is the core of the role)

• Receive raw talking-head footage filmed on an iPhone

• Edit into polished Instagram Reels (cuts, captions, music, pacing)

• Our style is clean, warm, and professional — not trendy or overly produced

• Deliver 2-4 edited Reels per week



Posting & Scheduling

• Post content to Instagram on a set schedule

• Write or finalize captions using provided scripts and brand voice

• Add relevant hashtags



Carousel Design

• Design 1–2 carousels per week in Canva using our existing templates

• Content and copy will be provided — you bring the visual execution



Automation Management

• Maintain and monitor our ManyChat comment-trigger flows

• Manage our Flodesk or Kit
 sequences — tagging, list hygiene, basic troubleshooting

• Flag anything that needs attention



Community

• Monitor comments and DMs

• Respond to straightforward comments using provided guidelines

• Flag comments that need a personal response from the psychologist



---

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

• Proven Instagram Reels editing experience — please include a portfolio or examples

• Comfortable with Canva, ManyChat, and Kit/Flodesk (or very willing to learn)

• Excellent written English — your caption writing will represent a licensed professional

• Reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented

• Someone who genuinely cares about the mission — this content helps real couples who are new parents

• Available for a short weekly check-in via voice or video



---

WHAT THIS IS NOT

This is not a high-volume, post-10-times-a-week account. This is a focused, quality-first account where every piece of content matters. We're looking for someone who takes pride in their work and wants to grow with us long-term.



---



HOURS & PAY

• Approximately 8–10 hours per week to start

• Long-term position with room to grow as the account and business expand

• Please include your hourly rate when you apply

---

HOW TO APPLY

Please send:

1. A short introduction (3–5 sentences) about your experience with Instagram content

2. 2–3 examples of Reels you have edited

3. Your familiarity with ManyChat and Kit (honest is fine — we can train the right person)

4. Your availability and hourly rate



Applications without Reels examples will not be reviewed. We will respond to every serious application within 3 business days. 



We look forward to talking with you! 

-Sarah & Tucker

title: Insurance Claims Operations Specialist (Contract) — Product Testing
description:
We're building AI tools for insurance claims teams. We need someone who's lived this work to help us test and refine the product.



You're a fit if you've:



Worked in a BPO or shared services center handling insurance claims operations for a US or European insurer, MGA, or TPA. You've personally touched first notice of loss (FNOL) intake, claims adjudication, policy servicing, endorsements, audits, renewals, or submission processing. You know what breaks in the real workflow: the missing documentation, the edge-case escalations, the manual data entry across back-office systems, and the quality gaps that slip through.



What you'd do:



Test our product against real-world insurance claims scenarios and integrations. Flag edge features we're missing. Pressure test the system — especially around document processing, data extraction, and business logic rules. Help with product design. Build demos with real use cases and data.



Requirements:



- 3+ years hands-on insurance claims or policy operations in a BPO or shared services setting for a US or European insurance carrier, MGA, or TPA.

- Direct experience with claims management systems, document intake workflows, and back-office processing tools.

- Familiarity with FNOL handling, claims file preparation, or policy servicing workflows.

- Strong English communication.

- Comfortable giving blunt, specific feedback.



Bonus if you have experience with:

- AI-assisted document processing or automation tools in insurance.

- Quality assurance or human-in-the-loop verification processes.

- Working with APIs or system integrations in an insurance context.



How to apply:



Feel free to message me directly on WhatsApp at 
for a fast reply. Please include your resume or LinkedIn, your OnlineJobs.ph profile link, and a short note about your past insurance claims experience and why you think you'd be a good fit for this role.

mber to support our sales and operations pipeline.

Lead Generation

- Collect key contact information including name, company, and
 address

Daily
 Outreach (YAMM)

 campaigns using YAMM (Yet Another Mail Merge) via Gmail — approximately 50–60
s per sending account per day

 templates and verify merge fields are accurate before each send

s sent, opens, replies, etc.) in the tracking sheet

Phone Number Research

- Source numbers by reviewing
 conversations, signatures, and other available records

- Update Pipedrive CRM with all discovered contact information



Subcontractor Payments

- Process payments to subcontractors and track payment schedules

- Confirm subcontractors are paid accurately and on time

- Maintain organized payment records for internal reporting



Accounts Receivable Management

- Monitor outstanding customer invoices and follow up on pending or overdue balances

- Communicate professionally with customers regarding payment status

- Record received payments in both the CRM and QuickBooks to keep financial records up to date



What We're Looking For

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail — data accuracy is non-negotiable

- Comfortable working with tools like Google Sheets, LinkedIn, Apollo, YAMM, Pipedrive, and QuickBooks

- Self-starter who can manage daily workflows independently without heavy oversight

- Clear communicator, both written and verbal

- Prior experience in lead generation, sales support, or administrative operations is a plus



Why Gutter Guru

- Flexible remote work environment

- Clear processes and workflows — you'll know exactly what success looks like

- A growing company where your contributions have a direct impact

- Collaborative, no-nonsense team culture



Please apply using the link below:

title: Senior Lending Intelligence & Bank Relationship Specialist (Philippines Only – Remote)
description:
READ FIRST – Not a Basic VA Role



We are hiring someone in the Philippines with real lending experience and real banking connections.



This role is for someone who has:

 • Worked inside a bank, credit union, lending company, or broker office (USA)

 • Built relationships with branch managers, relationship managers, or business banking reps

 • Seen high-limit approvals happen firsthand

 • Wants long-term stability, growth, and performance-based income



If you have experience working with banks like Chase, Fifth Third, or similar U.S. institutions — especially handling business credit cards or business lines of credit — this opportunity is for you.



?



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who:

 • Has access to or relationships with branch managers or business banking representatives

 • Understands how approvals are influenced for:

 • $50K+ business credit cards

 • $75K–$100K business lines of credit

 • High-limit unsecured funding

 • Has firsthand knowledge of approval behavior (not theory)



Examples of the types of approvals we are targeting:

 • $50,000+ business credit cards

 • $100,000 business lines of credit

 • High-limit unsecured credit through relationship banking



If you have worked around these approvals, we want to speak with you.

Compensation Structure



This is not just a fixed salary role.



You will receive:

 • Competitive base pay

 • Commissions when clients get approved

 • Large bonuses when clients secure high funding amounts

 • Long-term growth opportunity



This position is designed for someone who wants a professional home — a place to grow, be valued, and build something long-term.



If you perform well and help drive approvals, your income grows with it.



Responsibilities

 • Document real lender approval patterns based on your experience

 • Help identify which banks are currently approving higher limits

 • Leverage relationships with bank reps or branch managers when appropriate

 • Track approval tendencies by:

 • Credit score

 • Income

 • Business revenue

 • Bank deposits

 • Assist in structuring borrower profiles to increase approval odds

 • Build and maintain an internal lender intelligence database



Required Background (Must Have At Least One)

 • Former Bank Loan Processor

 • Former Loan Underwriter

 • Business Banking Assistant

 • Relationship Manager Support Staff

 • Lending Operations Staff

 • Broker Submission Manager



We are not hiring entry-level virtual assistants for this role.



Major Advantage (Priority Consideration)

You will receive priority if you:

 • Have direct contact with business banking reps

 • Have access to branch managers

 • Previously assisted with high-limit approvals

 • Worked inside U.S.-based banks or credit unions

 • Can explain how business lines of credit are actually approved



Screening Questions (Required – Be Specific)

 1. Have you worked directly with branch managers or relationship managers? Explain your role.

 2. What is the highest business credit card limit you personally saw approved?

 3. What borrower profile typically qualifies for $50K+ business credit cards?

 4. What does a borrower need to qualify for a $75K–$100K line of credit?

 5. Do you currently maintain any banking contacts?



Generic answers will not be considered.

How to Apply



Submit:

 • Your resume

 • Answers to all screening questions

 • Your WhatsApp number

 • Your
 address



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

Final Note



We are building a serious funding operation. This role is for experienced professionals who understand how approvals truly work and want to grow with a long-term team.



If you have real insider knowledge and real banking relationships, this opportunity can be highly rewarding.

title: Customer Success & Sales Support Manager
description:
Remote | Full-Time | Must work US Pacific Time hours

Compensation: $1,500–$2,500 USD/month to start, depending on fit and experience, plus performance bonuses and growth upside



About Us



We’re a fast-growing founder-led wellness brand based in Las Vegas. We’ve built strong traction, loyal customers, and a product people genuinely love.



Now we’re hiring a sharp, highly organized, customer-facing operator to help us drive more revenue, improve retention, and create more opportunities from behind the scenes.



This is not a passive admin role. You will play a direct part in helping the business grow.



The Role



You’ll sit at the intersection of customer success, sales support, outreach, and CRM ownership.



Our local team is out in the market selling, building relationships, and creating 
ntum. Your job is to back that up online by making sure leads are followed up with, customers are taken care of, opportunities keep moving, and nothing slips through the cracks.



You will help create growth through:

 • lead follow-up

 • customer support

 • onboarding

 • partner and affiliate outreach

 • CRM management

 • follow-through and pipeline support



You are not just here to “assist.”

You are here to help turn attention into revenue, customers into long-term fans, and conversations into real opportunities.



How Performance Is Measured



You will be judged on 3 things:



1. More Revenue

How well you help move leads, follow-ups, and opportunities toward real sales.



2. Better Retention & Customer Experience

How well you create a smooth customer journey, solve issues quickly, and keep customers engaged and happy.



3. More Opportunities & Cleaner Pipeline

How well you help generate opportunities through outreach and follow-through while keeping the CRM organized and actionable.



Core KPIs may include:

 • follow-up speed and consistency

 • opportunities created

 • meetings booked

 • revenue influenced

 • onboarding quality

 • retention / repeat orders

 • CRM accuracy and pipeline hygiene



What You’ll Do

 • Follow up with warm leads, prospects, and customers

 • Manage customer communication across text,
, phone, and CRM

 • Support onboarding and customer success

 • Reach out to affiliates, partners, and collaboration targets online

 • Keep the CRM, notes, and follow-up tasks updated

 • Support post-meeting follow-up and coordination

 • Help improve templates, workflows, automations, and internal organization

 • Make sure opportunities keep moving and nothing gets dropped



Who You Are

 • Strong spoken and written English

 • Warm, polished, and professional in communication

 • Highly organized and detail-oriented

 • Strong with follow-up and naturally proactive

 • Comfortable with customer service, sales support, and outreach

 • Confident using CRM systems like GoHighLevel, Close, HubSpot, or similar

 • Comfortable using AI tools to move faster and work smarter

 • Able to manage multiple moving parts without losing track

 • Available full-time during US Pacific Time business hours



Strong Plus If You Have

 • Experience in customer success, executive support, account management, sales support, or business development

 • Experience with lead follow-up and pipeline management

 • Experience with affiliate outreach, online partnerships, or social media outreach

 • Experience in wellness, hospitality, consumer brands, or relationship-driven businesses

 • Experience building workflows, SOPs, automations, or better systems



Important — Read Before Applying



Please do not apply unless you can follow instructions exactly.



This role requires strong communication, attention to detail, follow-through, and customer-facing professionalism. The application process is part of the evaluation.



If you do not follow the instructions below exactly, your application will be dismissed without review.



This includes:

 • missing the Loom video

 • going over the time limit

 • skipping any required question

 • ignoring the exact submission format

 • unclear spoken English for a customer-facing role

 • lack of availability during US Pacific Time business hours



This is a customer-facing role. You must have clear, professional spoken English and be comfortable on calls, voice notes, and video.



How to Apply



Send one complete application with these 3 items:



1. A Loom video (maximum 2 minutes)



Start by saying:



“My name is [Your Name], I’m in [Your City], and today is [Date] at [Time].”



Then answer these 2 questions:

 • Tell me about a time you helped create revenue or opportunity through follow-up, outreach, customer communication, or account management. What did you do, and what was the result?

 • This role involves customer success, lead follow-up, outreach, CRM ownership, and sales support. How would you structure your first 30 days to create 
ntum and make sure nothing slips through the cracks?



2. A short paragraph

Tell us why you are a strong fit for this role.



3. One sentence only

Complete this sentence exactly:



“The KPI I’d be most excited to own in this role is ______.”



Only complete applications will be reviewed.



What Happens Next



If your application shows strong communication, ownership, organization, and follow-through, the next step will be a Zoom interview and a short paid test project.



We move fast and are looking for someone who can do the same.

title: Chief Marketing Officer
description:
About Us



We are a US-based event ticket marketplace on a mission to create a more efficient and seamless selling experience.



As we continue to grow, we’re looking for a Chief Marketing Officer who can take full ownership of our marketing function, bring structure to the team, and drive measurable growth across the business.



This is a great opportunity for a senior marketing leader who enjoys building strategy, leading teams, improving performance, and making a real impact in a fast-moving company.



Why This Role Matters



Right now, we need someone who can step in and become the clear owner of marketing.



We’re looking for a leader who can set the direction, align the team, improve accountability, and ensure our marketing efforts are tied to real business outcomes. You’ll play a key role in helping the company scale by turning marketing into a more focused, data-driven, and performance-oriented function.



What You’ll Be Doing



As our Chief Marketing Officer, you will lead marketing end to end, from high-level strategy to day-to-day direction.



Your responsibilities will include:



Marketing Strategy & Leadership

• Own and lead the overall marketing strategy for the business

• Turn company goals into a clear and actionable marketing roadmap

• Identify the highest-impact growth opportunities across channels

• Set priorities, timelines, and budgets for marketing initiatives

• Ensure the marketing team is aligned, productive, and focused on what matters most



Team Management & Direction

• Lead and manage the existing marketing team

• Provide clear direction, structure, and accountability

• Help the team move beyond just execution by creating better focus and strategic clarity

• Identify gaps in the team and recommend or hire additional support such as freelancers, agencies, or channel specialists when needed



Growth & Demand Generation

• Oversee multi-channel marketing efforts including:

• SEO

• Paid acquisition

• Outbound growth

• Content

• Other performance-driven channels

• Improve lead generation, customer acquisition, and conversion performance

• Ensure all channels work together within one cohesive growth strategy

• Review current funnels, campaigns, and processes to improve underperforming areas



Performance, Metrics & Accountability

• Define KPIs, dashboards, and reporting systems for the marketing function

• Track ROI and ensure marketing spend is tied to measurable outcomes

• Run regular performance reviews and team check-ins

• Build a culture of testing, learning, and data-backed decision-making

• Improve visibility, organization, and accountability across the department



Cross-Functional Collaboration

• Work closely with leadership to align marketing with business goals

• Collaborate with sales and other teams to strengthen pipeline generation and messaging

• Help refine positioning, go-to-market priorities, and channel strategy based on market feedback and performance data



Who We’re Looking For



You may be a strong fit for this role if you are:

• A strategic marketing leader who also knows how to execute

• Comfortable taking ownership with minimal supervision

• Strong at leading teams, setting priorities, and building structure

• Deeply performance-driven and confident using data to guide decisions

• Experienced in managing multiple channels and tying marketing activity back to growth



Requirements



• 7+ years of experience in marketing

• Significant experience in a senior or leadership-level marketing role

• Proven success leading multi-channel marketing strategies and teams

• Strong experience in performance marketing, growth, paid ads, SEO, and demand generation

• Experience building structure, accountability, and reporting into marketing operations

• Strong analytical mindset and ability to measure what’s working

• Excellent communication and leadership skills

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment

• Able to operate independently and drive progress without constant oversight



Nice to Have



• Experience in marketplaces, e-commerce, ticketing, consumer internet, or transactional platforms

• Experience managing internal teams alongside agencies, freelancers, or specialists

• Background in scaling marketing functions for high-growth companies

• Familiarity with outbound or lifecycle-driven growth strategies



What Success Looks Like



In this role, success means:

• Marketing has a clear owner and strategic direction

• The team is focused, well-managed, and accountable

• SEO, paid, outbound, and content efforts are aligned and performance-driven

• Marketing spend is carefully tracked and tied to results

• Leadership has visibility into KPIs, progress, and next steps

• Marketing moves forward effectively without needing constant founder oversight



Why Join Us



• Work with a growing US-based company

• Take ownership of a critical leadership function

• Help shape the future of the business through smart, performance-driven marketing

• Lead a team and make a visible impact on growth



How to Apply



To apply, please send the following:

• Your updated resume

• Your portfolio or relevant examples of past marketing work, campaigns, wins, or case studies



Please also include a short message telling us about your experience leading marketing teams and driving measurable business growth across multiple channels.

title: Virtual assistant- Training  Academy Builder
description:

?

?



Huge Plus (but not required)

?



Pay

?



Why This Role Matters



You will help build a real training system that directly impacts the quality of care for seniors.



This is not just data entry — you are helping build something meaningful.



?



To Apply

 4. Answer this question:

???? “If I gave you a rough outline, how would you turn it into a training module?”

title: Part-Time Digital Advertising Specialist
description:
Role Overview:

We are seeking a hands-on Digital Advertising Specialist to set up, manage, and optimize paid ad campaigns aimed at generating both residential and commercial leads in NSW for electrical and solar services. You will focus on platform-specific strategies to capture high-quality inquiries online under strategic guidance from senior marketing leadership.

Key Responsibilities:

• Plan, execute, and optimize geo-targeted Meta and Google Ads campaigns targeting NSW residential customers using local intent keywords

• Develop and manage LinkedIn Ads campaigns targeting commercial clients based on industry, company size, and decision-maker roles

• Test and manage leads generation activities on Australian lead marketplaces such as ServiceSeeking and Hipages

• Support and coordinate with Google My Business and local SEO efforts to amplify ad performance

• Collaborate with the marketing lead and VA estimator to ensure smooth lead flow and campaign alignment

• Provide detailed weekly reports with performance insights and optimization recommendations

• Prepare for campaign launch within 4 weeks, progressively increasing lead volume and quality

Requirements:

• Demonstrable experience managing successful paid ad campaigns on Meta, Google, and LinkedIn

• Knowledge of lead generation strategies across residential and commercial sectors

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment and meet deadlines

• Experience with Australian online lead marketplaces is a plus

• Strong analytical, communication, and reporting skills

• Availability approximately 20 hours per week with flexibility

Compensation:

Competitive hourly rate and potential bonuses linked to lead generation performance.

How to Apply:

Submit your resume, portfolio of past campaign results, and a brief outline of your approach to online lead generation for both residential and commercial clients.

title: Personal Assistant to CEO / Executive
description:
Job Title: Personal Assistant to CEO / Executive



Location: Remote / Flexible (with ability to work U.S. hours)



Job Type: Part- time grow into Full-time



About Us:

We are a fast-paced, high-growth business seeking a proactive, detail-oriented, and highly organized Personal Assistant to support the CEO. This role is critical for keeping operations smooth, freeing up the executive’s time, and ensuring that business and personal priorities are handled efficiently.



Role Overview:

We are looking for a top-tier Personal Assistant who can anticipate needs, communicate effectively, and manage complex schedules. This person will be the right-hand support for the CEO, handling both business and personal tasks with professionalism, discretion, and exceptional attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Manage and organize executive’s calendar, including scheduling appointments, meetings, and personal commitments

 • Prepare, draft, and edit professional and executive-level
s and correspondence

 • Make outbound calls, follow up with clients, vendors, or stakeholders (must have own dialer)

 • Coordinate travel arrangements, lodging, and itineraries

 • Conduct research and prepare briefing materials for meetings

 • Track tasks, deadlines, and follow-ups to ensure nothing falls through the cracks

 • Handle confidential and sensitive information with discretion

 • Anticipate needs and provide solutions proactively to free the executive’s time

 • Assist with personal tasks as needed, including errands, appointments, and household coordination

 • Collaborate with other tea
mbers to support business operations seamlessly



Skills & Qualifications:

 • Exceptional communication skills (written and verbal)

 • Highly organized with outstanding attention to detail

 • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to think outside the box

 • Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines efficiently

 • Executive-level
 and correspondence writing skills

 • Professional demeanor and discretion when handling sensitive information

 • Tech-savvy with familiarity in calendars,
 management, spreadsheets, and virtual collaboration tools

 • Must have own dialer for outbound calls

 • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

 • Proactive, anticipates needs, and takes initiative



Ideal Candidate:

 • Someone who can streamline processes, take ownership of tasks, and significantly reduce the executive’s workload

 • A reliable and resourceful individual who thrives in a fast-paced environment

 • Someone who sees themselves as an extension of the executive and business



Compensation:

 • Competitive salary based on experience

 • Opportunity for bonuses tied to performance and results



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume and a cover letter detailing your experience supporting executives, your communication skills, and examples of how you’ve gone above and beyond in previous roles.

title: Creative Performance Strategist
description:
We’re looking for a mid-to-senior Creative Performance Strategist to own and scale performance creative across paid social and video channels. This is a fully remote role aligned with U.S. business hours (Pacific Time Zone), where you’ll operate as a core member of our growth team, driving creative strategy that directly impacts revenue.



This role sits at the intersection of creative thinking, data, and performance marketing. You won’t just launch ads—you’ll design frameworks, hooks, and messaging that consistently produce scalable direct response results. You’ll collaborate closely with creators, editors, and media buyers to develop, test, and optimize creative that drives CAC efficiency, CTR, ROAS, and overall revenue growth.



What You’ll Own

• Lead creative strategy for paid acquisition across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, and emerging channels

• Develop performance-driven hooks, angles, messaging frameworks, and concepts rooted in data and social commerce insights

• Build and manage a structured creative testing system with weekly roadmaps, clear hypotheses, and scaling logic

• Analyze performance metrics (CTR, hook rate, CPA, ROAS) to inform creative direction

• Break down creative performance at the hook, first 3 seconds, body, and CTA to identify optimization opportunities

• Research competitor, creator, and platform trends to identify winning formats and whitespace opportunities

• Write actionable creative briefs for editors and creators and guide production to ensure content converts

• Partner with media buying to align creative strategy with account structure, bids, and scaling decisions

• Systemize learnings through naming conventions, testing logs, and performance frameworks for compounding insights



What We’re Looking For

• 4–6 years of experience in creative strategy, performance marketing, or growth marketing

• Proven track record developing direct response creative for TikTok and Meta

• Deep understanding of creator-style content and social commerce

• Strong analytical skills and ability to translate data into actionable creative insights

• Experience working with creators, editors, and media buyers

• Ability to build and execute structured creative testing frameworks

• Bonus: Experience in beauty, skincare, or lifestyle DTC brands, TikTok Shop, or scaling paid social creative at meaningful spend



Why This Role

This is an opportunity to help build a best-in-class performance creative engine from anywhere in the Philippines. You’ll have real ownership and autonomy to create repeatable creative frameworks that drive scalable, profitable growth.







If you're interested, please send a link or copy of your resume.

title: Virtual Assistant | Coding Experience Needed | Dance Academy - Salsa/Bachata
description:
Full-time, long-term opportunity.



No virtual assistant experience needed.



Looking for tech-savvy people with coding experience.



Environment here is CREATIVE and FUN.



ABOUT US

We are the largest salsa & bachata dance academy in Los Angeles and are always expanding.



Busy times!



The culture here is FUN and friendly. Our goal is to make every student feel welcome and completely taken care of all the time.



Dancing changes lives - we are on a mission to deliver the best salsa/bachata educational experience on Earth.



The company is MaS Dance Academy.



YOUR FOCUS:

"Virtual Assistant"



This role has much a wider variety of tasks than working in a large corporation, which makes it more challenging but also more fun.



Some examples:

• Automating procedures (with or without A.I.)

• Website updates

• CRM development

• App updates (built on React Native - experience not required)

• Creating beautiful, concise, clean reports,

• Research

• Etc.



Our culture is fast-paced and every day is unique.



Although you'll begin by doing what is asked, over time (and the sooner the better), you'll need to pro-actively and independently handle tasks/projects without being told and recommend new projects based on opportunities you see. For a smart, motivated person, this role will be more stimulating than a traditional virtual assistant role.





SCHEDULE

9:00am - 6:00 PM PST (Los Angeles time) Monday - Friday 





GROWTH:

Payment increases over time.



If you are outstanding, long-term there may also be the opportunity to be promoted into a leadership role





TRAINING:

You'll receive basic training but many things you'll need to figure out on the fly. You must be a quick learner with a "can do" attitude.





COMPANY CULTURE

Working in a small business like ours is very different from a large corporation. Some of the differences are:



• More creativity: you'll handle a wide variety of tasks and projects. This is more challenging than just following strict templates, but also more stimulating and exciting.



• Impact: your actions will have a big impact on the business, which you will clearly see



• Feedback: your feedback on what we are doing well, and what could be better, is not only valued, but is mandatory! We want everyone here thinking as if they were the business owner.





ABOUT YOU:

• Excellent written English (show this in your application!)

• Coding experience

• Technical - great with computers

• Good listener - only needs to be told once

• Strong communicator (you must OVERcommunicate with management and tea
mbers)

• Smart, quick learner

• Fastidious - attention to detail

• Decent at basic math

• Pro-active - anticipates what may be helpful and goes above and beyond to contribute

• Meticulous, organized, methodical.

• Reliable! Always shows up and focuses.

• Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task.

• Willing to share your opinion - we NEED to hear your opinions

• Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time

• Always eager to improve yourself and the company’s systems. Habitually thinks strategically and takes action for improvements.

• Self-starter

• Independent decision maker

• Flexible - can quickly adjust on the fly

• Comfortable with excel

• Fast computer

• Fast, dependable Internet

• Bonus if you have experience or interest in salsa or bachata!



APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING:



1. A brief intro about yourself



2. Can you work the hours requested?



3. Complete this form: 
/
. Write in the subject line of your application: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit)



5. What coding education or experience do you have? (Javascript, HTML, CSS, React Native, Zoho CRM , Zoho Deluge, or anything else?)



6. These positions are competitive, often with hundreds of applicants. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position?





(Don't
 me off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, I personally check every application here)



Looking forward to meeting you!



Danny







---------

Search: VA , virtual assistant , executive assistant , code , python , javascript , C , C+ , C++ , Deluge , API , AI , A.I. , artificial intelligence, llm , automate, automation , zoho , crm , deluge , make , n8n , zapier , react , react native

title: Data Validation Expert
description:
About Fundable



At Fundable, we are building a new-age startup intelligence platform. We combine

advanced web-scraping and LLMs to track VC-backed startups in real-time, sourcing

and extracting key financing details from the latest press releases. Our mission is to

provide the most comprehensive, accurate, and up-to-date data on the startup

ecosystem, offering real-time deal coverage and transparent sourcing as a cost

effective alternative to industry leaders.



Job Description: Data Validator

We are seeking a detail-oriented Data Validator to assist with reviewing, verifying, and

validating data ingested from our pipeline.



This is an integral role for our startup. As an early-stage company, this position offers

the unique opportunity to wear many hats. While your primary focus will be data

validation, you will be encouraged to learn about, and potentially contribute to, other

functions such as sales, growth, or product development based on your interests and

evolving company needs.



Responsibilities

- Review and meticulously verify the accuracy of newly reported funding rounds

and related data.

-- Related data consists of (but not limited to)

-- Investors, Angel Investors, Lead Partners, Valuations, etc

- Research companies to find missing funding rounds

- Validate company slugs (linkedin, x, pitchbook, crunchbase, etc)



Requirements

- Understanding of the Venture Capital (VC) and startup ecosystem.

- General understanding of finance (what is an investor, M&A, IPO, etc.)

title: Delivery Program Operations Associate
description:
At Medley, we empower the next generation of leaders at the world's most iconic companies through transformational group coaching. Our clients are Fortune 500 organizations and other leading enterprises across industries. As a Delivery Associate, you'll play a central role in executing the operations that make our coaching programs run - managing participant communications, tracking program data, coordinating logistics, and ensuring every touchpoint reflects the quality our clients expect.



This role (40 hours per week) is ideal for someone who thrives in fast-paced, detail-intensive environments and takes pride in polished, client-ready work. You'll work closely with our Delivery Team to support multiple active cohorts simultaneously. You should be someone who doesn't just execute tasks - you anticipate what needs to happen next, flag issues before they escalate, and look for ways to make processes better.



Your regular working hours will be aligned to US Eastern Time (e.g., 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM ET). Additionally, from May through September 2026, you will provide coverage for a series of APAC-timezone workshops that fall during normal business hours in the Philippines.



What You'll Do:



- Manage Participant Communications: Draft, personalize, and send session-related
s to program participants - including attendance follow-ups, goal reminders, session prep materials, and recaps. Tailor communications based on participant data (attendance history, goals, engagement patterns). These
s go directly to senior and executive leaders at major enterprises - every communication must be polished, professional, and on-brand.



- Run Cohort Administration: Track attendance across active cohorts, maintain accurate records, and flag patterns (e.g., repeated absences) for follow-up. Coordinate scheduling, manage cohort Slack channels, and keep internal team members aligned on upcoming sessions and deadlines. Own the operational details that keep programs running smoothly - calendar invites, session materials distribution, coach communications, and status updates.



- Support Data Collection, Analysis, and Reporting: Help build and QA survey instruments for midpoint and endpoint data collection. Review and clean program data, identifying inconsistencies or errors before they reach client-facing materials. Support the creation of midpoint and endpoint presentations that demonstrate program impact to clients.



- Contribute to Client-Facing Materials: Support the creation and formatting of presentation decks, infographics, session guides, and participant worksheets. Ensure all materials are visually consistent, error-free, and ready for client and coach audiences.



- Provide APAC-Timezone Workshop Coverage: Provide operational support for workshops scheduled during APAC business hours (May - September 2026), including logistics coordination, real-time troubleshooting, and post-session follow-up.



- Drive Process Improvement and Automation: Identify inefficiencies in delivery workflows and propose solutions. Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, NotebookLM) to improve communications quality, streamline repetitive tasks, and support data analysis. Contribute to team-wide automation efforts using platforms like Make (Integromat), Slack integrations, and other tools.



- Collaborate Across the Team: Participate in daily standups, weekly cohort reviews, and team planning sessions. Log time

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
About Saltd Studio:

Saltd Studio is a creative branding, web design, and marketing studio that works with small to medium-sized businesses. We specialize in building intentional, beautiful brands and websites for service-based and some product-based business owners, and we help market them long-term. We value great relationships with our clients and team, creative ideas and designs, high standards in quality and client deliverables, and having fun throughout it all. 



We’re looking for a Social Media Content Creator to support with social media content, video editing, and creative marketing support.



Key Responsibilities:

 -Edit short-form video content such as Instagram Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts

 -Create on-brand static and video-based social media content

- Create social media captions 

 -Assist with content brainstorming and marketing ideas

 -Post and schedule content across social media platforms

 -Cross-post content to additional platforms



Qualifications:

 -Strong written English skills

 -Experience editing short-form video content

 -Comfortable with Canva

- Experience staying on-brand within content with a set color palette, logos, fonts, tone of voice, etc. 

 -Experience with additional content editing tools (CapCut, Premiere, Final Cut, etc.) is a plus, but not required

 -Creative thinker who enjoys brainstorming content ideas

 -Detail-oriented and organized

 -Comfortable communicating with our team over Slack and participating in regular Zoom video calls

 -Experience writing short-form video scripts is a plus, but not required

 -Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT to assist with content ideation

 -Able to work independently and manage deadlines while keeping us in the loop

 -Comfortable using tools like Google Drive, Dropbox, ClickUp, Slack, etc.



Rate & Benefits:

 $650/month for 40 hours per week (starting rate)

After initial employment trial period, tea
mbers are eligible for the following benefits:

- 10 days of PTO and Sick Leave annually

- Parental leave

- An office supply allowance

- 13th-month pay

- Professional development and courses to support your work skillset

- Paid holidays



How to Respond:

 -Reply to this job posting with a link to your resume and examples of content, social media posts, or design work you have done.

 -Include the phrase “sea salt” in your response. Why? This lets us see who is actually paying attention.

title: US Payroll Tax Position
description:
Job Posting: Payroll Tax Specialist (Remote – Eastern Time Hours)



Location: Remote (Must be available to work Monday–Friday, 8:30am - 5:00pm PM EST)

Job Type: Full-Time

Department: Payroll & Compliance

Reports To: Payroll Manager / Controller



About the Role

We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Payroll Tax Specialist to join our growing team. In this role, you will play a critical part in ensuring timely and accurate payroll tax compliance across multiple states and jurisdictions. You will regularly interface with the IRS, state Departments of Revenue (DORs), and Departments of Labor (DOLs) to conduct tax research, respond to notices, and remit tax payments multiple times per week.

If you're highly organized, thrive under pressure, and never miss a deadline, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



Key Responsibilities

Ensure accurate and timely remittance of payroll tax payments (federal, state, and local) multiple times per week.

Interface directly with the IRS, state DoRs, and DoLs to resolve tax issues, research changes in tax laws, and respond to inquiries or audits.

Perform regular reconciliations of payroll tax liabilities and filings.

Maintain accurate records of all tax payments and communications for audit and compliance purposes.

Track and manage tax notices, resolve discrepancies, and ensure full compliance with applicable laws and filing deadlines.

Collaborate with payroll and finance teams to maintain accuracy in payroll processing and tax calculations.

Use tools such as Excel and Asana to manage tasks and track progress.

Support payroll-related projects and audits as needed.



Required Qualifications

Minimum of 2 years' experience in US payroll tax operations, with demonstrated experience interacting with tax agencies.

Strong knowledge of US federal and state payroll tax regulations.

High proficiency in Excel (formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, etc.).



Experience with payroll software systems (e.g., ADP, Paychex, Paylocity, etc.).

Strong written and verbal communication skills—you’ll regularly represent the company with agencies.

Extreme attention to detail—accuracy is critical, and deadlines cannot be missed.

Self-motivated and organized, with the ability to manage priorities in a remote setting.



 Qualifications

Experience using Asana or other project/task management tools.

Multi-state payroll tax experience.

Familiarity with filing amended returns or prior period corrections.



This is a remote position, but you must be available to work Eastern Time hours from 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM, Monday through Friday.



Occasional overtime may be required during peak periods or deadlines.

title: E?Commerce Product Page & Content Assistant (Shopify)
description:
I’m looking for a highly organized, detail?oriented Virtual Assistant to help build and maintain product pages across multiple wellness brands in my Shopify store. This role involves applying pre?built product page templates, creating new templates for additional brands, and updating product listings so they are polished, consistent, and ready for publishing.



If you enjoy structured work, have an eye for clean design, and are comfortable working inside Shopify, this is a great long?term opportunity.



Key Responsibilities Include:



Product Page Creation & Updates:

- Apply an existing product page template across all products within a brand.

- Create new product page templates for additional brands using provided examples and guidelines.

- Update product descriptions, features, benefits, and layout to match brand tone and style.

- Format text, sections, and images to ensure consistency across the store.



Draft Product Setup:

- Review draft products in Shopify and prepare them for publishing.

- Add product details, specifications, and lifestyle copy based on brand direction.

- Ensure all product pages meet quality standards before going live.



Image & Content Organization:

- Upload and organize product images.

- Apply simple text overlays using Canva or similar tools (optional but preferred).

- Ensure all images follow brand styling and formatting guidelines.



Brand Consistency:

- Follow established templates and maintain a cohesive look across all product pages.

- Understand and apply different brand voices within the store.

- Keep product information accurate, clean, and conversion?focused.



Requirements

- Experience with Shopify (product setup, editing, and publishing).

- Strong English writing and editing skills.

- Ability to follow templates and brand guidelines with precision.

- Good eye for layout, formatting, and clean design.

- Comfortable working with tools like Canva, Google Drive, and Shopify admin.

- Reliable, organized, and able to manage multiple products at once.

- High attention to detail — accuracy is extremely important.



Preferred (Not Required)

- Experience with e?commerce product copywriting.

- Familiarity with wellness, beauty, or lifestyle brands.

- Basic image editing skills (resizing, cropping, simple text overlays).

- Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.



Work Details:

- Part?time to start, with potential to grow into a long?term ongoing role.

- Flexible hours

- Clear instructions, templates, and examples will be provided for tasks.

title: Mortgage Loan Support Specialist
description:
We are a fast-paced U.S. mortgage brokerage seeking an experienced Loan Support Specialist to assist with file management, document collection, and third-party coordination.

This is a behind-the-scenes, execution-focused role for someone who already understands mortgage files and can step in immediately without needing basic training.

Immediate Start Preferred

Active pipeline is in place and ready for support. We are looking for someone who can step in quickly and begin working on active loan files right away.

Responsibilities

Review loan applications (1003) for completeness

Identify and track missing documents and conditions

Send document request
s using templates

Upload, label, and organize documents in LOS (Arive or similar)

Stack and structure files correctly (income, assets, credit, etc.)

Audit files daily and flag missing or outdated items

Order and follow up on:

VOEs (Verification of Employment)

VORs (Verification of Rent)

VOMs (Verification of Mortgage)

Payoffs and other third-party documentation

Contact employers, landlords, and third parties to obtain required documentation

Maintain clean, organized, and up-to-date loan files at all times

Provide clear file notes and status updates internally

Assist with CRM updates and task tracking (GoHighLevel or similar)

Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

MUST have prior U.S. mortgage experience

MUST have hands-on experience reviewing and organizing loan files

MUST have experience working inside a Loan Origination System (LOS)

Experience with Arive is strongly preferred

Must understand standard mortgage documents (income, assets, credit, etc.) without training

Must be able to identify missing items in a file immediately

Strong attention to detail and organization

Able to work independently without constant supervision

Comfortable making outbound calls to third parties (NOT clients)

Important

This is NOT a client-facing role

No communication with borrowers, agents, or realtors

All communication will be internal or with third parties only

This role requires prior mortgage experience.

If you do not have direct experience working with U.S. mortgage files and reviewing loan documents, please do not apply.

Work Environment

Work will be completed using our shared admin
 and internal systems

Must be able to maintain a clean and organized inbox

Must be responsive and able to manage multiple files at once

Must be available during U.S. business hours (or overlap)



Application Requirements (Required to be Considered)

Please include the following in your application:

What Loan Origination Systems (LOS) have you used? (specifically list if you have used Arive)

Describe how you review a new loan file for missing documents

List the standard documents you expect to see for income and assets

About This Role

This is not a training position.

We are looking for someone who can step in, take ownership of file organization, and immediately support an active pipeline.

title: Customer Service Specialist — Shopify E-Commerce Brand
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a growing Shopify brand looking for a highly capable and self-driven Customer Service Specialist to own and run our entire customer service operation. This is not a basic support role, we need someone who can handle the day-to-day with consistency, proactively identify opportunities to improve our processes, and help us build a strong CS infrastructure as we scale.



You will be the first point of contact for our customers across multiple channels, including support tickets, social media, and payment disputes. We want someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and shows up consistently every single day.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



-Managing all customer service communications across our Shopify store

-Handling inquiries, complaints, returns, refunds, and order-related issues via Gorgias

-Following established workflows and SOPs precisely — and handling edge cases confidently when no SOP exists

-Proactively identifying rising or recurring issues (e.g. product complaints, delivery problems, policy gaps) and flagging them before they escalate

-Delivering daily reports and insights on CS performance, trends, and customer sentiment

-Advising on improvements to our CS workflows, tools, and overall department setup

-Helping us build out and document new SOPs, processes, and automations as we grow

-Collaborating with the team via Slack and keeping internal documentation up to date in Notion and Google Sheets

-Moderating our Meta 
) presence — removing negative or harmful comments, responding to positive engagement, and handling customer DMs in a timely and on-brand manner

-Managing chargebacks and payment disputes on both Shopify Payments and PayPal — submitting evidence, responding within deadlines, and working to recover lost revenue



REQUIRED TOOLS



Gorgias

Shopify

Slack

Google Sheets

Notion

 / Meta

PayPal

ParcelPanel (ParcelWill)



REQUIREMENTS



-Minimum 2 years (but more is expected) of experience in customer service within a Shopify e-commerce environment

-Proficient with all tools listed above (Gorgias, Shopify, Slack, Google Sheets, Notion)

-Hands-on experience with Meta moderation — managing 
ments and customer DMs in a professional, brand-appropriate way

-Proven experience handling chargebacks and payment disputes on Shopify Payments and PayPal, including building evidence packages and meeting response deadlines

-Strong spoken and written English — we require a 9/10 level of fluency. Your communication must be clear, professional, and natural at all times

- Include the word apple somewhere in your application otherwise we won't read it

-Able to follow SOPs to the letter, while also exercising sound judgment in situations not covered by existing processes

-Strong attention to detail — you notice patterns and issues before they become problems

-Self-motivated — you do not need to be chased to complete your work

-Consistent — your output and availability are reliable every working day

-Able to produce clear, concise daily reports on CS activity, issues, and insights



LARGE BONIS IF YOU HAVE:



Previous experience as a CS Manager or team lead

Experience building CS workflows or SOPs from scratch



WHAT WE VALUE



We are a small, focused team. We are not looking for someone who needs constant direction — we need someone who can take ownership of this department, bring ideas to the table, and execute reliably without hand-holding. Proactivity, consistency, and clear communication are non-negotiables for us.



HOW TO APPLY



Please apply with a short introduction covering your relevant experience and the tools you have worked with. We also ask that you include a breakdown of a few of your previous positions. For each one, tell us: what your role involved, what you excelled at, and what your main challenge or struggle was. Be honest we value self-awareness as much as experience.



Please also include one or two examples of how you have improved a CS operation or successfully handled disputes or social media moderation in a previous role.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Energi

Energi (NRG) is a scalable and secure blockchain ecosystem, designed to power the next generation of Web3 applications, DeFi protocols, and NFT marketplaces. Built on a robust Proof of Stake (PoS) infrastructure, Energi combines Ethereum compatibility, on-chain governance, a self-funding treasury, and a Layer 2 masternode network to drive innovation in decentralized technology.

Our remote-first team spans the Americas, Europe, Africa, Asia, and Oceania, working together to push the boundaries of blockchain scalability and security. With a growing network of global contributors, we are committed to building a blockchain that is not only secure but also developer-friendly and highly scalable.

Energi is engineered to support millions of users, making it an ideal platform for high-performance dApps, NFT marketplaces, and decentralized finance solutions. Our ecosystem is designed for fast, cost-effective transactions with a focus on long-term sustainability.

By fostering collaboration, innovation, and a forward-thinking culture, Energi is redefining the Web3 landscape. Explore our vision and mission at 
.





WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU:

-Work flexible hours from anywhere as part of a globally distributed team driven by innovation and shared values.

-Directly shape the future of blockchain technology in NFT development.

-Enhance your skills and creativity with cutting-edge blockchain, smart contract, and Web3 technologies.

-Be part of an advanced blockchain ecosystem and contribute to building next-gen NFT platforms.

-Competitive pay structure in a 50/50 split of ETH and NRG tokens.



Front-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We seek a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer specializing in NFT platforms to drive the front-end development of our decentralized applications. You’ll create immersive Web3 experiences while integrating blockchain-based features like Metamask and smart contracts.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Work closely with UX designers to create seamless NFT marketplaces and dApps.

-Develop interactive front-end features integrating Web3.js and smart contracts.

-Optimize UI performance and ensure mobile responsiveness.

-Maintain existing applications and introduce new blockchain features.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of experience in front-end development.

-Proficient in React, Gatsby, and Web3 frameworks.

-Experience integrating blockchain wallets like Metamask.

-Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.

-Fluent English communicator with a passion for blockchain.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Experience with Web3, Infura, and The Graph.

-Familiarity with NFT metadata standards and ERC-721/ERC-1155.

-SEO optimization skills.



Back-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We’re looking for a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer to build the backend for NFT applications. You’ll be responsible for designing, maintaining, and optimizing APIs that connect blockchain smart contracts with scalable Web3 applications.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Develop secure APIs that interact with NFT smart contracts.

-Optimize backend infrastructure for high-traffic NFT transactions.

-Implement blockchain indexing solutions for NFT metadata retrieval.

-Write unit tests to ensure security and efficiency.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of back-end development experience.

-Proficiency in Golang, NodeJS, and GraphQL.

-Experience with blockchain data structures and decentralized storage.

-Passionate about blockchain innovation and fluent in English.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Knowledge of smart contract security best practices.

-Prior experience with NFT minting platforms.

-Remote work experience.



This role is not open to 3rd party organizations or agencies. Any candidates sent will be considered free of any charges



Energi is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, pregnancy, disability, age, veteran status, or other characteristics.

title: $8,000 From ONE Partnership - Need Crypto Network, Not Experience (Remote BD)
description:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- Your
 handle

We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: Business Development & Customer Success Associate
description:
As a Business Development & Customer Success Associate, you’ll serve as the voice of a growing floral and gifting brand to both potential and existing clients. Your primary focus will be outbound calling to businesses to generate leads, build relationships, and uncover new opportunities. You’ll also play an important role in refining messaging, supporting customer service, and coordinating with internal operations teams to ensure a smooth client experience.



Key Responsibilities:

Lead Generation & Relationship Building

-Conduct outbound calls to businesses to introduce the company’s offerings and generate qualified leads particularly to other businesses.

-Build rapport with potential clients, understand their needs, and identify opportunities for collaboration.

-Document key insights from calls, including contact details, interest level, and next steps.





Sales Intelligence & Process Mapping

-When a lead doesn’t convert, dig deeper to understand the prospect’s buying process, decision-makers, and timing.

-Share findings with the team to improve targeting and messaging strategies.





Team Communication & Messaging Optimization

-Write clear, concise call notes and summaries to share with the team.

-Provide feedback on what messaging resonates and suggest improvements.

-Be available for ad hoc calls or huddles to pivot strategy based on real-time insights.





Customer Service & Operational Support

-Respond to customer inquiries via
 with professionalism and empathy.

-Coordinate with the florist and warehouse teams to ensure timely fulfillment of customer requests or issue resolution.





What We’re Looking For:

-Experience with B2B (business-to-business)

-Excellent verbal communication and active listening skills.

-Comfortable making cold calls and navigating gatekeepers.

-Strong writing skills for internal documentation and customer communication.

-Proactive, curious, and adaptable — you’re not afraid to ask questions or change course.

-Team player who thrives in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.

-Bonus: Experience with ShipStation, Shopify, Etsy or customer support platforms. / Experience in the floral business



NOTE:

If you're interested in this position, please send a link of your resume and make sure that it's viewable.

We need someone who is confident over the phone, has great English communication skills and someone who can totally relate to the clients.

title: B2B Appointment Setter (High Commissions)
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



Hey, I am Jordan! I am looking for 1 elite appointment setter for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for just 1 person to do outbound B2B cold calling for me.



I help Roofers with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads

-- Call roofers and ask if they want to schedule a free consultation to learn about A.I. and their businesses

-- Schedule them, and make sure they show-up to their appointment.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You care more about making commissions for each sold appointment. If you are someone that relies on hourly do not apply.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $3-6/hour base (depending on experience). 

-- $25 each appointment that shows up

-- $200 each appointment that signs up for our services

-- $50-$500 in monthly bonuses. Yup, really!

-- Expect to make $650-$1,500 for PART TIME WORK.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.  If you talk about other jobs you will be disqualified as we only want to talk about jobs that relate to the job we are offering.

-- Put "Dial And Smile" in your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:

1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) Are you willing to complete a short calling test before being hired:

title: Customer Relationship & Retention Specialist (Team Lead & Systems Setup)
description:
Customer Relationship & Retention Specialist (Team Lead & Systems Setup)



Core Objective:

To architect and lead the transformation of our existing database into a self-sustaining referral engine. You will be responsible for setting up the referral team, establishing the operational framework, and building long-term relationships that drive repeat sales and new introductions.



Key Responsibilities

Team Leadership & Setup: Standardize the referral process, create scripts, and oversee the initial setup and expansion of the referral outreach team.



Reactivation & Retention: Conduct outbound reach-outs to past customers to ensure satisfaction and identify new needs.



Referral Generation: Systematically ask for and track referrals from our happy client base.



Strategic Upselling: Confidently introduce complementary products (Headboards, Sheet Sets, Mattress Protectors, etc.) during every interaction to maximize Lifetime Value (LTV).



Post-Service Excellence: Follow up on recent deliveries to ensure the product experience meets our standards, strengthening long-term loyalty.



Administrative Management: Maintain accurate records in the CRM, manage follow-up schedules, process sales documentation, and coordinate with logistics to resolve any post-delivery hurdles.



Requirements & Schedule

Experience: 5–7 years of relevant experience in CRM, Account Management, or Sales (previous leadership or systems setup experience preferred).



Evidence of Success: Proven track record (portfolio, case studies, or data-backed references) demonstrating your ability to drive retention and referral revenue.



Schedule: Full-time (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Australian Time).



Success Metrics (KPIs)

Team Performance: Timely setup of referral workflows and daily contact volume.



Growth: Total referrals generated per week.
