title: Aquisition Manager (Real Estate Investing)
description:
We are a growing real estate investment company. We acquire residential, and land properties through cash offers targeting distressed and motivated sellers across North America.



We are looking for a hungry, self-motivated Acquisition Manager to join our team on a commission-only basis. This is a performance-based role ideal for someone who thrives in sales, loves real estate, and wants unlimited earning potential.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Follow up with warm and cold leads generated.

- Speak directly with motivated sellers, build rapport, and negotiate purchase agreements

- Negotiate the lowest possible acquisition price  your commission is tied to profit, so the better you negotiate, the more you earn

- Analyze basic property details and comparable sales to determine offer pricing (training provided)

- Present cash offers to sellers and handle objections

- Guide sellers through the contract and closing process

- Update CRM with deal progress, notes, and status changes

- Meet or exceed monthly acquisition targets

-This is not a fulltime job. The only thing that's required is you must be able to call warm lead IMMEDIATELY as it comes through, so you must be on stand by.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Excellent English communication skills (phone and written)

- Experience in real estate, sales, or cold calling (MUST)

-Must have Real Estate Investing Knowledge and how it works

- Ability to handle rejection and stay persistent

- Strong negotiation skills and ability to build trust quickly

- Comfortable using CRM tools

- Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace for calls

- Available to work during North American business hours (EST)



COMPENSATION:

- Commission: 5% of the after-sale profit per completed deal

- Estimated earnings: $500 (minimum / month) with commissions up to $6,000 per month.

- The lower you negotiate the acquisition price, the higher the profit, and the bigger your commission your skills directly impact your pay.

- No cap on earnings, the more deals you close, the more you earn

- Average deal cycle: 2-16 weeks

- Top performers can realistically close 4+ deals per month





WHY JOIN US:

- Leads are generated for you. No need to build your own pipeline

- Work remotely from anywhere

- Be part of a fast-growing, tech-driven real estate investment firm

- Opportunity to grow into a leadership role as we scale

- Training and scripts provided to get you started



This is a START position we need someone ready to hit the ground running immediately. If you have the drive and want to earn based on results, apply now.

title: Influencer Marketing Role | Direct Client |PH / Morning Shift
description:
Who Are We?

Nordic Quality is an extremely awesome, up-and-coming, online-based company selling physical products under several of our brands. The main one of which is in the gym and fitness category.



Who are we looking for?

We are looking for an Influencer Marketing Manager with some familiarity in Social Media Management to play a crucial role at Nordic Quality, a company specializing in gym equipment and weight-lifting products. This role involves managing and expanding partnerships with fitness influencers, as well as overseeing the brand’s social media presence across platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and
. The ideal candidate is passionate about health and fitness, stays up to date with social media trends, and has experience building engaging content and communities in the gym and weightlifting space.



WHAT WOULD THE TASK BE?



-Build all processes for acquiring new digital influencers, as well as maintaining existing ones.

-Identifying the most relevant influencers in the industry on major and minor social media channels such as YouTube,
, Instagram, Slickdeals, etc., by doing research and/ or using tools.

Form relationships with influencers before asking them to advocate for the products or the company in general.

- Persuade digital influencers to promote our products with little to no upfront cost;

- Ensure that all possible measures have been taken to retain existing influencers.

- Establish a Sponsored Athlete Program, affiliate programs, and partnerships with influencers, and manage everything related to these.

- Set up and take charge of activities surrounding the Influencer page on the company website;

- Boost the brand's online presence on relevant forums/message boards by responding to comments and subtly promoting our products.

- Lead the department dedicated to influencer marketing, once set up, and collaborate with other team members of other departments whenever necessary.

- Come up with a marketing plan/strategy on a weekly/monthly basis (work alongside the marketing manager to do this, especially for our product promotions);

- Tally UGCs for content posting on social media, including Instagram,
, YouTube, and TikTok.

- Social Media Management: Plan, coordinate, and schedule social media content on
, Instagram, and TikTok at least two weeks (14 days) in advance while also managing real-time updates and promotional posts in collaboration with the Marketing team/Marketing Assistant to keep calendars accurate, timely, and aligned with campaign priorities.

- Manage some Amazon Ads or work on other Amazon-related tasks in Amazon US, Amazon UK, and Amazon Japan (using ChatGPT whenever needed);

- Create an attribute link for promotions and influencers and analyze them as part of the KPI every month.

- Create and manage campaigns and influencers on Amazon Creator Connections regularly.

- Create and maintain updated SOPs for the Influencer Team.

- Regularly review existing SOPs and make adjustments as needed.

- Other related tasks or tasks in the marketing department.

- Slack (communication tool) visibility during the contractor’s working hours.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in lead generation, influencer outreach, and social media management. Preferably in the e-commerce or fitness industry (but not necessarily)

- Familiarity with lead generation tools and CRM systems (is a plus!)

- Strong written and verbal communication skills.

-Has experience with Canva

- Has an interest in creating compelling social media posts

- Ability to multitask, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines.

- Knowledge of basic marketing principles and techniques.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.



You must also have the following;

- With a perfectly working device (additional backup is a plus)

- With a reliable internet connection (additional backup is required)

- Headphones/earphones (for meetings)



HOW TO APPLY?

Congratulations on making it this far in the job application process! Interested? We'd be delighted to hear from you.

Please carefully follow all of the instructions below to send an application:



1. Use the following as the subject of your message:

Influencer Marketing - (Insert Your Full Name Here)

Example: Influencer Marketing - Maria Santos



2. Cover Letter - The body of your message will serve as your cover letter, so discuss your experience and persuade me to add you to the team while highlighting your writing abilities.



3 The link to your CV/ resume (strictly with your picture)





Thank you & Best of luck!

title: Meta & Google Ads Media Buyer — DTC Brands (Remote | Long-Term)
description:
SMCA Creative Agency is a US-based performance marketing agency managing paid media for DTC and ecommerce brands. We're looking for a sharp, self-directed media buyer who can own Meta campaigns from strategy to execution — and make our existing strategies better, not just follow them.

Account spend ranges from $2,500 to $30,000 per month. You need to know how to work both ends of that range.

This is a long-term contractor role. We don't hire people who need to be managed.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Full Meta Ads management — strategy, build, launch, optimize

Google Ads support — primarily Search and Performance Max

Improving on strategies handed to you — we want your thinking, not just your execution

Identifying creative gaps and developing concepts for new ad creative

Weekly performance reporting with clear explanations — not just numbers, but what they mean and what we're doing about it

Communicating proactively when something needs attention





REQUIRED SKILLS



3+ years running Meta Ads for DTC or ecommerce brands

Proven results at account spends between $2,500–$30,000/month

Google Ads experience — Search and/or PMax

Strong understanding of DTC customer acquisition funnels

Creative strategy — you can brief or concept new ad angles, not just manage budgets

Clean, clear reporting — you explain performance like you're talking to a client, not an algorithm

Written English fluency





WHO YOU ARE

You understand that media buying is part science, part instinct. You know when to test, when to scale, and when to kill something. You don't wait for instructions when the data is telling you something. You bring ideas to the table — new angles, new audiences, new creative concepts — because you actually care about the results.

You've worked with DTC brands. You understand offers, hooks, and why creative is the variable that changes everything.



HOW TO APPLY

No generic applications. Answer these four questions:



What DTC brands have you run Meta Ads for? Include spend levels, ROAS or CPA results, and what you did specifically to drive performance

Walk me through how you'd approach a new Meta account at $5,000/month spend for a skincare brand — what are your first 30 days?

How do you identify when creative is the problem versus the targeting or the offer?

What does your weekly reporting process look like? How do you communicate performance to a client who isn't in the ads manager every day?



Applications without answers will not be reviewed.

title: Ad Creative Designer — DTC & Ecommerce Brands (Remote | Long-Term)
description:
SMCA Creative Agency is a US-based performance marketing agency serving DTC and ecommerce brands. We're looking for a versatile creative designer who lives at the intersection of design and performance — someone who understands that every asset they make needs to stop the scroll, communicate the offer, and drive action.You'll be producing static ad creatives across Meta, Google,
, and web. You'll work across multiple client brands simultaneously, each with their own aesthetic and audience.This is a long-term contractor role. If you can't work fast and independently across different brand voices, this isn't the right fit.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Static ad creatives for Meta and Google

 design assets

Web design support — banners, landing page sections, image assets

Maintaining brand consistency across multiple client accounts

Writing short-form headlines and hooks — you don't just design around copy, you improve it

Turning a creative brief into a finished asset with minimal back and forth





REQUIRED SKILLS



Figma, Canva, and Adobe Suite — you work in all three

Strong static design fundamentals — hierarchy, typography, color, composition

DTC and ecommerce creative experience — you know what performs, not just what looks good

Basic copy skills — headlines, hooks, short-form ad copy

Ability to manage multiple brand aesthetics simultaneously without blending them

Fast turnaround — landing pages and ad sets can't wait a week

Clear communication in English



BONUS SKILLS



Motion graphics or basic video editing

Understanding of Meta ad formats and spec requirements

 template design experience





WHO YOU ARE

You've made ads that actually worked. You understand the difference between pretty design and performance design. You can take a brief like "DTC skincare brand, female audience 25–45, new hero product launch" and come back with three distinct creative concepts — designed, copy written, ready to test.

You don't need someone to tell you what size to export. You don't need three rounds of revisions to get the concept right. You ask the right questions upfront and deliver clean.



HOW TO APPLY

No generic applications. Answer these three questions:



Share your portfolio — specifically show static ad work for DTC or ecommerce brands across Meta, Google, or

Walk me through how you approach a new creative brief — from receiving direction to delivering final assets

Give an example of a time you improved on a creative concept you were handed — what did you change and why?



Applications without a portfolio and answers will not be reviewed.

title: Content Operations Manager (Full-Time, Remote)
description:

You’ll make sure all content (videos, images, and assets) is up-to-date, properly labeled, and ready for use across our platforms.

Responsibilities

Coordinate between multiple content teams — Outreach Creators, Organic Social Team, Editors, and
 Team.

Ensure each team receives the correct approved assets (images, videos, clips) on time.

Label, track, and store all files systematically to avoid duplication or misplacement.

Maintain and update Asana project management boards — make sure all tasks are assigned, labeled, and followed up.

Double-check that only approved videos go to editors or organic content teams.

Report weekly on content progress, missing assets, and workflow blockers.

Must have experience with Google Drive and Asana.

Comfortable working remotely and managing multiple teams.

Good understanding of digital content production (videos, images, social posts).

High attention to detail — labeling, naming, and sorting accuracy is a must.

Nice-to-Have (Bonus Points)

Compensation & Schedule

Rate: $5 USD per hour

Work during Sydney (AEST/AEDT) business hours.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
We're Not Looking for Someone Who "Does SEO." We're Looking for Someone Who Lives It.



We're building our internal marketing team from the ground up — and the first person through the door needs to be exceptional. We want an SEO specialist who eats algorithm updates for breakfast, who tracks rankings obsessively, and who gets genuine satisfaction from watching organic traffic climb.



If SEO is your craft, your passion, and your competitive edge — read on.



THE ROLE



This is a full-time, long-term position not a short-term contract or a side gig. We're investing in someone who wants to grow with us and make SEO the backbone of our digital presence. You'll have real ownership, real impact, and the freedom to do the work the right way.



You'll be working autonomously so if you need hand-holding, this isn't the role for you. But if you're the type who thrives when given a goal and the freedom to chase it, you'll love it here.



What you'll be doing:

- Owning and executing our full SEO strategy — technical, on-page, and off-page

- Conducting in-depth keyword research and competitive analysis

- Auditing and optimising site structure, page speed, schema, and crawlability

- Building and managing high-quality link acquisition campaigns

- Producing and optimising content that ranks and converts

- Tracking, analysing, and reporting on organic performance with clear, data-driven insights

- Staying ahead of algorithm changes and proactively adapting strategy



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We want someone who can prove it. Not just talk about SEO — but show us the numbers. Rankings lifted. Traffic grown. Revenue driven. We'll be asking for case studies and real results.



You're the right fit if you:

- Have a proven track record of delivering measurable SEO results (bring the data)

- Live and breathe SEO — you're reading industry news, testing theories, and refining your craft constantly

- Can work independently and manage your own time without micromanagement

- Are deeply skilled in technical SEO — not just content optimisation

- Have strong experience with tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, and GA4

- Communicate clearly and can translate data into actionable strategy

- Are hungry to build something great, not just maintain the status quo



WHAT YOU WON'T FIND HERE

- Bureaucracy that slows you down

- A revolving door of strategy changes

- A team that doesn't value what SEO actually does



And for the right person, we back it up with an attractive salary package that reflects the true value a great SEO specialist brings to the table.



THE DETAILS

- Employment Type: Full-Time, Permanent

- Hours: Monday to Friday

- Location: Remote

- Remuneration: Attractive salary package on offer



OUR HIRING PROCESS



We take hiring seriously — because we want the best. Shortlisted candidates will be required to complete a skills assessment via TestGorilla to demonstrate their SEO knowledge and problem-solving ability.



Steps:

1. Submit your application to 

2. Initial review of your results and portfolio

3. TestGorilla assessment (shortlisted candidates)

4. Interview with our team

5. Offer to the right person



HOW TO APPLY



Send us your CV, a brief cover letter, and — most importantly — examples of your SEO results. Screenshots, case studies, traffic graphs, ranking movements — show us what you've achieved and how you achieved it. Applications without evidence of results will not be considered.



We're looking for the real deal. If that's you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Senior VOB Specialist | Remote | $5/hour
description:

You must have 5+ years of direct US healthcare experience handling verification of benefits, insurance eligibility, payer communication, and coverage review. Experience working with DME benefit verification is strongly preferred.



This is not an entry-level role and this is not a training position. If you do not have real, hands-on experience with US insurance verification and benefits workflows, please do not apply.



You must be confident with:

• Verification of benefits (VOB) and eligibility checks

• Reviewing active coverage, plan type, and patient responsibility

• Confirming deductibles, out-of-pocket amounts, copays, and coinsurance

• Determining in-network and out-of-network benefits

• Reviewing referral, authorization, and pre-certification requirements

• Verifying DME coverage criteria and payer-specific benefit rules

• Identifying documentation requirements and plan limitations

• Calling US insurance companies and communicating professionally

• Documenting benefits accurately and completely in EMR, PM, and internal systems

• Working in payer portals, EMR, and practice management systems

• Coordinating with clinical, authorization, and billing teams to prevent delays in care or claim denials



This is a remote role working closely with a husband-and-wife team. We are looking for someone professional, dependable, detail-oriented, and comfortable working independently.



Compensation:

• $5/hour



Schedule:

• Monday through Friday

• 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST

• 30-minute unpaid break at 1:30 PM EST

• Some weekends required when workload requires it



Requirements:

• 5+ years of direct US healthcare insurance verification, VOB, or revenue cycle experience

• Strong VOB / eligibility and benefits verification experience required

• DME benefits verification experience strongly preferred

• Strong English communication

• Comfortable using RingCentral

• Comfortable working through a remote PC / remote desktop

• Reliable internet and a professional home office

• Available during the required hours



Hiring requirements:

• Smile Checks background screening

• Criminal background verification

• Reference verification

• Contractor onboarding and agreement through Deel



Long-term opportunity:

This is a long-term independent contractor opportunity. We are looking to build an ongoing working relationship with the right person for as long as the arrangement continues to be a good fit for both sides.



Do not apply if:

• You do not have 5+ years of direct US healthcare insurance verification, VOB, or related experience

• You do not have strong hands-on benefits verification experience

• Your background is mainly admin, VA, customer service, or coursework only

• You need training on insurance verification basics



To apply, include:

 1. Total years of US healthcare / VOB experience

 2. Total years handling DME benefit verification

 3. Specialties supported

 4. EMR / PM / payer portal systems used

 5. A short explanation of how you verify benefits and identify patient responsibility

 6. Resume

 7. Voice recording in English

 8. Confirmation that you are comfortable with Smile Checks, Deel, RingCentral, remote PC work, the required schedule, and working with a husband-and-wife team



Required first line of application:

I have 5+ years of direct US healthcare experience with strong verification of benefits experience.

title: Land Wholesaling Operations VA — Real Estate Experience Required
description:
JOB TITLE:

Land Wholesaling Operations VA — Real Estate Experience Required



JOB DESCRIPTION:

We run a land wholesaling business focused on vacant land acquisition and resale across multiple US states. We run high-volume direct mail campaigns to source motivated sellers, acquire properties under contract, and facilitate back-to-back closings with end buyers.

This is a full-time, long-term remote role. We are not looking for a generalist VA. We need someone who understands how real estate wholesaling works — ideally land specifically — and can own the operational side of the business without handholding.

The owner handles all market research, county selection, deal analysis, and final decisions. The VA owns the workflow: mailer coordination, CRM management, seller and buyer communication, title coordination, and buyer marketing.

This role is designed to deepen over time into a specialized land operations position. If you want stable, long-term work with room to grow, this is it.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:

CRM Management



Log all inbound seller responses (phone, web form, mail) same day, M-F

Maintain clean pipeline records from initial contact through closing

Set follow-up tasks and reminders; make sure no leads or milestones fall through

Pull basic pipeline and activity reports as needed



Seller Communication



Handle inbound seller calls during agreed business hours

Follow up with sellers who received offer letters; document all responses

Ask qualifying questions, assess motivation, gather property details

Escalate ready-to-sign leads to the owner



Direct Mail & Outreach



Coordinate with mail vendor to schedule and send seller letters and offer letters each month

Manage neighbor letter campaigns through external vendor; track responses and log in CRM

Check with the property manager at owner's mailing address for mail 1-2x per week; document and route correspondence

Track all mail activity in the CRM



Comps Coordination



Submit comp requests to external service provider for all properties under evaluation

Log results in the deal file and CRM; flag anything unusual for owner review

Serve as the primary contact with external service provider for comps



Title & Closing Coordination (Buy Side)



Once a seller is under contract, contact the title company and initiate escrow

Gather and submit required documentation and entity information via external service provider

Serve as day-to-day contact for title; escalate anything requiring owner decision

Monitor contingency deadlines and title timelines; flag upcoming milestones proactively



Buyer Marketing & Disposition



List properties for sale on selected social media/advertising platforms; manage inquiries and respond to buyers

Build and maintain a buyer list in CRM; follow up with interested parties

Screen buyers; collect proof of funds or financing docs as needed; escalate qualified buyers



Double Close / Back-to-Back Closing Coordination



Open the B-C leg of escrow once a buyer is confirmed

Coordinate closing date, notary setup, and all documentation with title

Coordinate with transactional funders (external) to confirm A-B leg funding; provide HUD/closing statement

Track outstanding checklist items across multiple simultaneous deals

Post-closing: confirm funds received, update CRM, file all deal documents





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

Required:



Real estate wholesaling experience — you understand the deal cycle from seller contact through closing

Strong CRM discipline — records updated same day, providing a daily report--plan to meet with ownership weekly as well

Clear written and verbal English — you communicate professionally with sellers, title, vendors, and the owner

Self-directed — you flag problems early, don't need micromanagement (after training period completes)

Reliable availability during agreed US business hours

Looking for long-term work, not a short-term placement



Preferred (top of pay range):



Land wholesaling experience specifically — vacant land is different from houses, and candidates with documented land experience are prioritized

Experience with Investment Dominator CRM or a comparable real estate CRM

Experience coordinating double closes or back-to-back closings

Experience working with transactional funders

Experience managing
 Marketplace listings and buyer inquiries





THIS ROLE IS NOT:



A research role. The owner handles market selection and deal analysis.

A general admin position. You need to know what a double close is and how title works in a land deal.

A house wholesaling VA role adapted for land. If your background is exclusively single-family, please note that clearly when you apply.





HOURS & COMPENSATION:



Full-time: 35-40 hours/week, consistent schedule



Candidates with verified land wholesaling experience will be placed at the top of the range





TO APPLY, PLEASE INCLUDE:



Summary of your real estate wholesaling experience — note land experience explicitly if you have it

CRM and tools experience

Closing coordination experience — types of closings and volume

Your proposed hourly rate

One example of a deal you managed from initial contact through closing — your specific role and what happened

2-3 career/business references (letters are ok but it's ideal if these are people we can connect with directly)



Applications without relevant real estate experience will not be considered.

mbers have grown with us over the years.

Publishing posts on
, Instagram, and YouTube (will train on this)

Bella

Partner / Co-Owner

Platform Marketing

title: Course Management Director
description:
---



ABOUT THE ROLE



I am a retired physician, course creator, and entrepreneur with two online courses hosted on Thinkific and we are starting a YouTube channel called StartMyPractice. I am looking for a reliable, detail-oriented VA to run my entire content production pipeline — from raw audio recordings and text documents to finished, published course lessons and YouTube videos.



This is a long-term role with real growth potential. I already have an outstanding VA running my nutrition store (Agape Nutrition) on a base salary plus performance bonus. This role follows the same model. If you help grow course revenue to meaningful milestones, your bonus will put you in the top earners on this platform.  I am looking for someone to run this with very little supervision.  If you have to be told what to do, this position is not for you.  My role is provide the course content from an information basis and the rest is up to you to turn that into content.  Typically I will record an audio on Coconotes or another platform and the team with make the content.  A Youtube content expert can be provided if needed. 



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Course production (immediate priority):

- Take existing written content and format it into slide scripts using Canva

- Generate AI voiceover using ElevenLabs or Murf (training provided)

- Sync audio to slides and export finished video lessons

- Upload lessons to Thinkific with proper titles, descriptions, and ordering

- Flag gaps in content and maintain a completion tracker



YouTube and StartMyPractice channel:

- Receive audio recordings I make on my phone (Cocoa Notes)

- Upload audio to transcription tool (Otter.ai or Whisper), clean up the transcript

- Format transcript into a structured script and send for my quick approval

- Build simple branded YouTube thumbnails in Canva

- Upload approved videos to YouTube with title, description, and tags

- Maintain a weekly content calendar



Ongoing support:

- Manage course pages on Thinkific

- Assist with ConvertKit
 newsletter formatting and scheduling

- Repurpose video content into short social media clips or posts

- Handle student access issues and basic course support
s



---



WHAT I AM LOOKING FOR



- Strong written and spoken English

- Experience with Canva (required)

- Familiarity with Thinkific, Teachable, or any course platform (preferred)

- Comfortable learning new tools quickly — ElevenLabs, Otter.ai, YouTube Studio

- Highly organized and able to work independently without micromanagement

- Experience with medical, health, or educational content is a big plus

- Honest, communicative, and proactive — I want someone who flags problems early



---



COMPENSATION



Base salary: Competitive, based on experience (please state your expected rate in your application)



Performance bonus: Quarterly bonus tied to course revenue milestones. This is not a token bonus — it is structured to meaningfully reward your contribution to growth. My current VA earns a bonus that places him in the top 10% of earners on this platform when targets are met.



Hours: 20 hours/week to start, with the expectation of moving to full-time as the business grows.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send:

1. A short introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

2. Any examples of course content, Canva designs, or YouTube work you have done

3. Your expected monthly rate

4. One sentence on why you want a long-term role rather than short-term projects



Applications without all four items will not be reviewed. I am looking for someone who reads carefully and follows instructions — this application process is part of the screening.



I respond quickly and move fast once I find the right person.

title: Senior Client Success Manager
description:
General Summary:

The Senior Client Success Manager is responsible for nurturing strategic client relationships, serving as the client’s primary advocate. This role manages a portfolio of high-value, complex, or multi-location accounts, ensuring alignment with client goals, technology strategy, and the company’s services. In addition, the Senior CSM helps document, create, and continuously improve client-facing processes and internal practices to ensure scalable and consistent client success.



Position Responsibilities: 

• Strategic Client Advisory:

Serve as the trusted advisor for assigned strategic accounts, providing guidance and support to align business goals with IT strategy.



• Strategic Business Reviews:

Lead Strategic Business Reviews (SBRs) and technology alignment meetings to track progress and strengthen partnerships.



• Understanding Client Needs and Risk Advisory:

Assess client IT environments and business processes regularly to identify needs. Advise clients on potential IT risks and effective mitigation strategies.



• Account Planning:

Develop Account Plans and Client Roadmaps tailored to client objectives.



• Strategic Partnership with vCIO:

Partner with vCIOs to deliver strategic (business) technology roadmaps and planning.



• Escalation Management:

Act as an escalation point for client satisfaction issues, ensuring timely and effective resolution.



• Process Development:

Document and refine client success management processes, playbooks, and client engagement policies.



• Workflow & Standards Improvement:

Contribute to the continuous improvement of client-facing workflows, templates, and service standards.



• Expectation Management:

Ensure client expectations are clearly set, documented, and aligned with the company’s service deliverables.



• Cross-Functional Collaboration:

Collaborate with Service, Project, and Security teams to ensure proactive service delivery.



• Mentorship:

Mentor and coach other client success managers to ensure department consistency and growth.



• LCI Assessments and Recommendations:

Conduct periodic LCI assessments and provide strategic recommendations for IT improvements, lifecycle refreshes, and roadmap alignment.



• Client Communication:

Ensure consistent and strategic communication with key stakeholders about updates, upcoming changes, and service enhancements.



• Ownership of Client-Specific Top 5 High-Level Processes:

Own the review and maintenance of the top 5 high-level client-specific processes: After-hours communication protocols, computer onboarding, user onboarding, user offboarding, and procurement process and guidelines.



• ConnectWise Manage Oversight:

Maintain accurate strategic account data in ConnectWise Manage, including client company records, executive contacts and user roles, sites, etc.



Skills and Abilities: 

• Strong interpersonal and executive communication skills

• Excellent strategic thinking and problem-solving capabilities

• Process-oriented with a continuous improvement mindset

• Proficient in ConnectWise Manage or similar PSA systems

• Capable of mentoring and coaching junior staff



Qualifications:

• 5+ years of Account Management experience, preferably in an MSP or IT services environment

• Strong process-oriented mindset; able to identify areas for operational improvement

• Deep understanding of IT services, cybersecurity, and client advocacy

• Excellent communication and relationship management skills

• Strong project management and documentation capabilities

title: Service Representative (Fully Remote)
description:
Please Read the Whole Job Description Before Applying.



Meadow is transforming end-of-life care, one of the largest and most overlooked industries in America. In under two years, we became the largest independent funeral home in California and have since expanded to multiple states, with more markets on the way. We’ve earned an 80+ NPS, glowing reviews, and the trust of hundreds of families every month.



We believe great people live everywhere. Our team works across continents and time zones, grounded by shared values: high standards, deep empathy, and a drive to do work that matters.



Why join:

- Remote-first, global team: work from anywhere, be trusted to deliver

- Fair, transparent compensation: competitive pay, benchmarked globally.

- High expectations, high support: we invest in training and growth

- Respect and humanity: no burnout culture, no hero worship

- Real-world impact: your work supports families when it matters most.





About the Role:



We’re hiring Service Representatives to support families from the 
nt a loved one enters our care through the final steps of the cremation process. You’ll play a critical role in ensuring every case is handled with accuracy, compassion, and attention to detail.



In this role, you’ll own key parts of the journey - coordinating transportation, managing documentation, and ensuring ashes are returned safely. You’ll work directly with families and external partners to provide clarity, build trust, and make sure nothing is missed.



This position is ideal for someone who is empathetic, organized, and comfortable in a fast-moving startup environment. We’re in active build mode, and this role offers meaningful growth for someone who is proactive, collaborative, and motivated to support others during an important 
nt in their lives.



What You’ll Do:

- Respond to inbound calls, texts, and
s from families with empathy, clarity, and professionalism.

- Build trust quickly and maintain rapport as you walk families through each step of the process.

- Own key case stages: dispatching transportation, managing paperwork, scheduling cremation, and coordinating ashes return.

- Collaborate with internal teams and external partners to move cases forward without delay.

- Keep systems updated, document clearly, and flag issues before they become blockers.

- Anticipate downstream impacts and work proactively to ensure smooth handoffs between teams.

- Work across HubSpot, Aircall, Slack, GSuite, and our internal case management system.



Requirements & Qualifications:

- 2+ years in customer-facing, operations, or hospitality roles - especially in environments where empathy and execution were equally important.

- Clear, calm communicator who builds trust quickly, whether over the phone,
, or text.

- Strong multitasker - able to move quickly while maintaining accuracy and attention to detail.

- Accountable and proactive: you take ownership, close the loop, and surface issues early.

- Energized by our mission and excited about the opportunity to help shape something new in a category that truly needs it.



Details:

- Remote, 

- Compensation: $5-$7.80/hr USD

- Tools: HubSpot, Aircall, GSuite, Slack, and our case management system

- Schedule

- Full-time, 8-hour shift, consistent schedule

- Days: Monday–Friday, Tuesday–Saturday, or Sunday–Thursday 

- Weekend availability is a plus — one or both weekend days welcome.



Shifts: 

- 8 a.m. - 4 pm PT

- 9 a.m. -5 pm PT

- 11 a.m. - 7 pm PT (preferred)



Why Join Us:

- Fully remote: Work from anywhere

- Benefits: PTO, 10 Paid Holidays, Paid Training

- Global collaboration: Work with teammates around the world.

- Purpose-driven work: Make a real difference during one of life’s most meaningful transitions

- Supportive, growth-minded team: Bring your drive and eagerness to learn; we’ll support you every step of the way

- Team & Culture: Learn from experienced leaders and work closely with a founding team that values respect, collaboration, and building a healthy culture alongside a successful business.





Apply here:

title: B2B Appointment Setter ($200/closed deal + $25/Show-up + Bonuses)
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



Hey, I am Jordan! I am looking for 1-2 elite appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for just 1 person to do outbound B2B cold calling for me.



I help Roofers with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads

-- Call roofers and ask if they want to schedule a free consultation to learn about A.I. and their businesses

-- Schedule them, and make sure they show-up to their appointment.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You care more about making commissions for each sold appointment. If you are someone that relies on hourly do not apply.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $3-6/hour base (depending on experience).

-- $25 each appointment that shows up

-- $200 each appointment that signs up for our services

-- $50-$500 in monthly bonuses. Yup, really!

-- Expect to make $650-$1,500 for PART TIME WORK.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B. If you talk about other jobs you will be disqualified as we only want to talk about jobs that relate to the job we are offering.

-- Put "Dial And Smile" in your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:

1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) Are you willing to complete a short calling test before being hired:

title: Operations Manager (Client & Project Coordination)
description:
Whetstone Creative Agency is a real estate media and marketing company based in Southern Oregon.



We help real estate agents win more listings, market homes at a higher level, and build a brand that stands out. Our work includes photography, video, drone, and social media content, along with larger video production and commercial projects.



We move fast, hold a high standard, and care about doing things right.



The Role



We’re looking for someone to keep our projects organized, scheduled, and moving forward.



This role is simple to understand, but hard to do well.



You are responsible for making sure nothing falls through the cracks, from scheduling to delivery. You’ll manage client communication, coordinate the team, and ensure every project runs smoothly across multiple moving pieces.



You are not managing people.

You are managing clarity, timelines, and execution.



What You’ll Do



Scheduling is a core part of this role. You will schedule real estate photo and video shoots accurately, coordinate availability across photographers, videographers, and clients, and manage reschedules, cancellations, and changes. You’ll ensure all shoot details are complete and correct before the project begins, and balance speed with accuracy when booking.



You will communicate with clients by sending confirmations, reminders, and updates, setting clear expectations for timelines and deliverables, and responding to messages in a timely and professional manner. You will also handle change requests and communicate updates clearly.



You will track all projects from order to delivery. This includes both high-volume real estate shoots and larger video production and commercial projects. You’ll keep projects moving without delays or confusion and ensure deadlines are clear and met.



You will keep the team aligned by communicating assignments and expectations, making sure everyone knows what’s happening and when, sending reminders when needed, and flagging issues early so they can be solved.



Tools You’ll Use



You’ll work inside Spiro for CRM, scheduling, and delivery, Notion for project tracking and organization, Google Workspace for
, calendar, and documents, and ChatGPT to support communication and workflow efficiency.



What We’re Looking For



You are extremely detail-oriented, a strong communicator who is clear, fast, and professional, and highly organized and proactive. You’re comfortable managing a high volume of moving pieces and able to balance speed with accuracy. You take ownership and follow through.



What Success Looks Like



Shoots are scheduled quickly and correctly. Projects move from order to delivery without friction. Clients do not need to follow up for updates. The team always knows what’s happening. Nothing gets missed.



To Apply



Please apply and answer the following three questions in this exact order. If you do not follow these instructions, you will not be considered for this role. This is a detail-oriented role, and this step matters. (Keep answers to 1 paragraph.



1. Tell us about your experience that would make you a great fit for this role?

2. How are you setup to handle issues like storms, power outages, and natural disasters that can effect your work?

3. You get one free round-trip flight anywhere in the world. Where are you going and why?

s or messages regarding company matters.

title: Go High Level Specialist – Join a Fast-Growing Digital Marketing Agency
description:
Hey there! We're a digital marketing agency in an exciting growth phase, and we're looking for a talented Go High Level (GHL) Specialist to become a key part of our team.



One thing we want to be clear about upfront: we're looking for someone who wants a real home - not another client to add to their roster. If you run your own agency or are juggling multiple clients, this probably isn't the right fit. But if you're looking for a dedicated, full-time role where you can go deep, take ownership, and grow with a company that's going places - keep reading.



We want to be upfront with you: we're a startup moving fast, and this role matters. You won't just be executing tasks - you'll be helping us build the backend foundation that powers our entire client delivery engine. If you love systems, automations, and making things work seamlessly behind the scenes, you'll feel right at home here.



???? Compensation



During your first 90 days: $720 USD/month (paid bi-weekly)



After your 90-day probation: $850 USD/month base



Fully ramped earning potential: $1,050 – $1,350+ USD/month (base + performance bonuses)



???? What You'll Actually Be Doing



1. Client Setup & Deployment



- Set up new GHL client sub-accounts (phone numbers,
 config, domain masking) - templates are already built, so you're not starting from zero

- Import, customize, and deploy funnels, websites, and landing pages using our existing snapshots

- Build and manage automation workflows, triggers, and multi-channel campaigns

- Connect GHL to third-party tools via Zapier or native integrations



2. Ongoing Support & Optimization



- Be our go-to person for troubleshooting backend technical issues

- Proactively improve funnels and workflows to boost performance

- Keep an eye on key metrics and campaign health inside GHL

- Maintain clean system hygiene (custom values/fields) so snapshots always deploy correctly





3. ? What We're Looking For



- 2+ years of hands-on GHL experience - you know the platform inside and out

- You're looking for a full time dedicated role that you can grow in (this isn't for part time work while you do other things)

- A natural problem-solver - a broken trigger is a puzzle to fix, not a reason to panic

- Detail-oriented and process-driven - you double-check every branch before going live

- Strong English communication - comfortable explaining technical stuff clearly over Slack or Loom

- Available during Canadian EST business hours for daily syncs





???? A Note From Us

We're growing fast and building something real. This isn't a point-and-click role - we need someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and genuinely cares about getting things right. In return, you'll have a front-row seat to building a growing agency from the ground up, with room to grow alongside us.



???? How to Apply

We'd love to hear from you! Please apply through the link below - direct messages won't be considered, as all applications go through our screening process to keep things fair: APPLY HERE -->

description:
About the Role

We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Loan Processor to join our growing financial services team. In this role, you will be the backbone of our lending operations — reviewing, verifying, and processing loan applications from submission through closing. You will collaborate closely with loan officers, underwriters, and clients to ensure accurate, timely, and compliant loan packages.

01 Review and verify loan applications for completeness, accuracy, and compliance with lending policies and regulatory requirements.

02 Collect and organize required documentation including income verification, credit reports, tax returns, employment records, and appraisals.

03 Order and track third-party services such as appraisals, title searches, flood certifications, and credit supplements.

06 Coordinate loan closing activities including preparation of closing disclosures, settlement statements, and final loan packages.

- Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field

title: Experienced Cold Caller / Appointment Setter Needed for Digital Marketing Services
description:
We are an outbound lead generation agency that helps digital marketing agencies connect with home improvement businesses (plumbing, pest control, roofing, and similar companies) who will benefit from the marketing help (SEO, Google Maps Ranking, Google Ads, Google Business Profile Optimization, etc.)



We are looking for a highly disciplined cold caller (aka. appointment setter) who enjoys speaking with business owners and booking qualified meetings.



You will not be working alone. You will be part of a structured calling system with scripts, materials, and ongoing support from experienced callers and the founder.



Your primary responsibility will be to contact business owners and determine whether they are open to taking on new jobs, then schedule appointments for our clients.



This is a long-term role with opportunities to grow into positions such as:

- Cold Calling Team Manager

- High-Ticket Sales Representative

- Internal Sales Coach

& others



If you are consistent, coachable, and enjoy outbound communication, this role can become a stable long-term opportunity.



1) What Makes This Role Different?



Unlike typical freelance calling roles, you will work inside a structured system with real support.



You will receive:

- Proven scripts and calling frameworks

- Structured training on the system (from multi 4-figure business coaching & courses)

- Live feedback and call reviews

- Weekly team calls

- Mindset training (for continuous growth & support)

- A supportive team of other callers

- Direct guidance from the founder



Your job is execution. The strategy, systems, and materials are already prepared.



2) Who You Will Be Calling?



You will contact home improvement contractors, including:

- Plumbing companies

- Pest control companies

- Roofing companies

- Similar residential service businesses



Your goal is to determine whether they have the capacity to take on additional jobs and schedule a meeting with our client if appropriate.



3) Your Responsibilities



Your work will include:

- Calling business owners using a provided lead list

- Following the provided scripts and frameworks

- Qualifying prospects based on simple criteria

- Booking appointments for our clients

- Logging calls and outcomes in the tracking sheet

- Participating in team feedback sessions



Tools you will use include:

- GoHighLevel

- Google Sheets

- Notion

- Google Workspace tools



4) Requirements



- Strong English proficiency with minimal accent

- Comfortable speaking with business owners

- Consistent work ethic and reliability

- Ability to follow structured processes

- Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience



5) Preferred (But Not Required)



- Located in a United States time zone

- Experience calling local service businesses

- Familiarity with CRM tools



6) Work Structure



Part-time to start.

Opportunity to grow into full-time based on performance.

Work alongside a team of other callers.

Regular team communication and support.



7) Personal Traits We Value



We are looking for someone who is:

- Consistent in their work habits

- Coachable and open to feedback

- Calm and confident on the phone

- Professional when speaking with business owners



Cold calling is a skill that improves with discipline and repetition.

We value people who are committed to mastering the craft.



To confirm you have read this description, include the number 77 in your application.

title: E-commerce Admin Assistant & Personal Operations Manager (Inventory, Sales, Life Systems)
description:
? JOB OVERVIEW



I’m looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive Admin Assistant to help me manage and scale my e-commerce business while also supporting my personal life systems.



This role will start with inventory tracking and sales tracking, but will grow into a long-term partnership where you help streamline operations, automate systems, and keep everything running smoothly.



This is NOT just a task-based job. I’m looking for someone who wants to grow with me long-term.





? WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



* E-commerce Operations (Primary Focus)

Track inventory across platforms (eBay, Depop, etc.)

Update inventory quantities and product details

Log all sales into spreadsheets

Monitor order status (sold ? shipped ? delivered)

Assist with product listings (titles, details, organization)

Help identify best-selling products and trends



* Systems & Organization

Maintain and improve tracking system

Organize database and trackers

Help build systems to make the business more efficient

Suggest improvements (this is BIG, I want thinkers)



* Personal Assistant Tasks

Help manage my schedule and priorities

Organize tasks and daily workflow

Assist with reminders and planning

Help me stay accountable and on track





? WHO I’M LOOKING FOR



You are:

Extremely organized

Detail-obsessed (you catch mistakes others miss)

Reliable and consistent

Proactive (you don’t wait to be told everything)

A problem-solver, not just a task-doer

Comfortable with tracking systems

Interested in long-term work (VERY important)



Bonus if you:

Have experience with e-commerce (eBay, Shopify, Depop, etc.)

Understand basic profit tracking

Have worked as a VA or admin before





? IMPORTANT TRAITS



I value:

- Communication

- Honesty

- Ownership

- Growth mindset



I do NOT want someone who:

- Disappears

- Needs constant micromanaging

- Misses details

- Only does the bare minimum





? PAY & HOURS



Starting: Part-time (with potential to go full-time)

Pay: Based on experience (with raises as you grow)

Long-term opportunity with increased responsibility and income





? GROWTH OPPORTUNITY



This role can evolve into:

Operations Manager

Executive Assistant



If you prove yourself, you will grow with me.





* HOW TO APPLY



To apply, include:



Your favorite productivity tool and why

A short example of how you’ve organized something before

The word “GOAT” at the top of your application



Applications without these will NOT be considered.





? FINAL NOTE



I’m building something long-term.



If you’re someone who:

Wants stability

Wants to grow

Wants to be part of something bigger



Then this is for you.

title: Virtual Assistant / Business Development Assistant – Real Estate
description:

You must be confident speaking on the phone, communicate clearly in English, and provide daily updates without needing constant reminders.



Key Responsibilities



• Assist the Company Director with daily business tasks

• Data entry and CRM updates

• Prepare simple reports, documents, and presentations

• Follow up enquiries from advertisements and potential clients

• Assist with lead generation and business development tasks

• Provide regular updates on work progress

• General administrative support

Skills Required

Additional Skills (Optional / Advantage)

title: Performance Video Editor for Meta – Raw Footage ? High-Converting Creatives 01
description:
Hey, I'm Fatih – I've been in the ecom game for over 5 years. We currently have an open spot for a video editor on our team.

We're active in the German market, running paid ads for a baby product brand – and we're scaling.



What we're looking for:

We're not looking for someone who cuts clips together.

We're looking for someone who understands performance – someone who watches an ad and instantly knows why it works, why it doesn't, and exactly what to change.

You think in hooks, retention curves, and pattern interrupts. You understand that the first 3 seconds d
 everything. You know the difference between cinematic editing and direct response editing – and you've chosen the latter on purpose.

This is pure Meta performance editing:



Hook creation & pattern interrupts

Retention optimization

Direct response storytelling

UGC & native style ads

Text overlay psychology

Fast-paced editing for paid traffic

Sourcing your own footage (emotional family scenes, lifestyle clips, etc.)





What makes you stand out:

You work with AI – actively, not reluctantly. Experience with Higgsfield is a strong plus. You use AI as a creative weapon, not a shortcut.

You're coachable. You take feedback seriously and you're ready for short daily calls to review your work, discuss performance, and optimize together. You don't take critique personally – you use it to get better.

You're a team player. You enjoy collaborating, communicating openly, and being part of something that's actively growing.

You have a genuine passion for what performs. You study ads in your free time. You notice what stops the scroll. You're hungry to grow – not just to deliver.

Experience in the German market is a real advantage.



To apply:

Send us your portfolio – show us 3 ads you edited that ran on paid traffic.

Tell us who you are, what drives you, and why this role fits you.

Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Outreach VA / Appointment Setter for U.S. HVAC Market
description:
Outreach VA / Appointment Setter for U.S. HVAC Market



We are looking for a reliable, professional Outreach VA / Appointment Setter to help us book interviews with HVAC business owners in the United States.



This is not a closing role.

You will not be responsible for selling a product or handling advanced sales conversations.



Your job is to:



- contact HVAC business owners using our script

- follow up professionally

- book qualified interviews on the founder’s calendar

- keep notes and tracking updated



We will provide:



- the exact script

- the target market

- the messaging

- the qualification rules

- the booking process



Your role is to execute consistently, communicate clearly, and help us schedule qualified conversations.



Very Important



This role requires someone who is:



- comfortable cold calling

- coachable

- able to follow instructions exactly



You will be contacting business owners directly. If you are not comfortable making cold calls, this is not the right role.



You will also be given clear scripts, rules, and instructions. We need someone who can follow the process closely, take feedback well, and improve quickly.



Responsibilities



- Reach out to HVAC business owners using our script

- Make cold calls confidently and professionally

- Follow up with prospects professionally and consistently

- Book qualified interviews on the calendar

- Keep simple notes and tracking updated

- Flag strong prospects and common objections

- Follow instructions closely and stay organized



Requirements



- Strong written and spoken English

- Experience with outreach, appointment setting, lead generation, or VA work

- Must be comfortable cold calling U.S. business owners

- Comfortable communicating with U.S. business owners

- Organized, dependable, and coachable

- Must be able to follow a script and instructions closely without freelancing or going off-track

- Professional, polite, and persistent without being pushy

- Able to take feedback and apply it quickly



Bonus If You Have



- Experience contacting U.S. small business owners

- Experience with service businesses such as HVAC, plumbing, roofing, or home services

- Experience using Google Sheets, Calendly, CRMs, or outreach tools



Compensation



This role includes base hourly pay plus performance bonuses.



Base pay starts at $4 to $5 USD per hour, depending on experience and fit.



In addition to base pay, bonuses are available based on completed qualified interviews.



Strong performers who are reliable, coachable, and consistent will have the opportunity to earn more over time.



How to Apply



Please send:



- A short introduction about yourself

- Your experience with outreach or appointment setting

- The types of businesses you have contacted before

- A short voice recording introducing yourself in English

- The phrase: Qualified conversations beat busy work



Also answer this question:



How would you follow up with a busy business owner who did not reply to your first message?



Please Do Not Apply If



- You are not comfortable making cold calls

- You do not take direction well

- You prefer to improvise instead of following a script and process

- You are not available to communicate consistently and professionally

title: Meta Ads Account Manager
description:
ABOUT KORELIMITED

KORELIMITED is a culture-driven fashion brand celebrating Korean heritage through elevated design and storytelling. We exist at the intersection of identity, community, and modern streetwear — creating pieces that honor culture while shaping the future of it.



As we scale our global footprint, we are looking for a data-driven Meta Ads Account Manager to own our paid social ecosystem. You will be responsible for turning our brand story into a high-growth engine through
 and Instagram advertising.



OVERVIEW

The Meta Ads Account Manager will lead the strategy, execution, and optimization of all paid social campaigns. This is a high-impact role that sits at the intersection of creative strategy and technical performance.



You aren't just pushing buttons in Ads Manager; you are analyzing customer behavior, scaling winning creative, and ensuring KORELIMITED reaches the right audience at the right time. You understand that in streetwear, a high ROAS (Return on Ad Spend) comes from the perfect marriage of "The Math" and "The Magic."



RESPONSIBILITIES

Campaign Management & Scaling

Full-Funnel Strategy: Build and manage Meta ad campaigns across the entire customer journey: Prospecting (TOF), Retargeting (MOF/BOF), and Retention/LTV.



Budget Oversight: Manage and scale daily/monthly spend to hit aggressive revenue targets while maintaining efficiency (ROAS/MER).



Technical Setup: Ensure pixel health, Conversions API (CAPI) stability, and accurate catalog management for Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns (ASC).



Creative Strategy & Testing

Creative Directives: Collaborate with the content team to request high-performance assets (UGC, motion graphics, lifestyle photography) based on data-driven insights.



Rigorous A/B Testing: Lead a "test and learn" culture—testing hooks, headlines, formats (Reels vs. Static), and landing pages to constantly lower CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost).



Creative Analysis: Deep-dive into creative metrics (Hook Rate, Hold Rate, CTR) to understand why an ad is winning or losing.



Data & Reporting

Performance Reporting: Provide weekly and monthly reports on key metrics including Spend, Revenue, ROAS, CPA, and New Customer Acquisition.



Audience Insight: Build and refine Lookalike (LAL) audiences and high-intent interest stacks relevant to the streetwear and Asian-American cultural niche.



REQUIREMENTS

3+ years of experience specifically in Meta Ads/Media Buying for an E-commerce/D2C brand (Streetwear/Fashion experience is a major plus).



Proven Track Record: Experience managing 6-figure monthly budgets with a history of scaling brands profitably.



Analytical Mindset: You love spreadsheets as much as you love streetwear. You can look at raw data and turn it into an actionable strategy.



Technical Proficiency: Expert knowledge of Meta Business Suite, Shopify, and attribution tools (e.g., Triple Whale or GA4).



In-Office: This role is based at our HQ to ensure tight collaboration with the design and marketing teams.

title: Remote Level 2 Support Agent - ConnectWise Stack WFH
description:
READ BEFORE YOU APPLY AND SEND YOUR CV TO:







Company Overview

We are a  leading Managed Service Provider (MSP) dedicated to providing

exceptional IT solutions and support to our clients. We pride ourselves on leveraging best-in-

class technology, particularly the ConnectWise suite, to deliver seamless and efficient service.

We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Level 2 Remote Support Agent to join our

technical team.



Position Summary

The Level 2 Remote Support Agent will be a critical member of our team, responsible for

resolving the most complex technical issues, acting as an escalation point for Level 1 and Level

2 technicians, and managing key MSP tools. This role requires deep expertise across the

entire ConnectWise stack and proficiency in related technologies. The ideal candidate must

be capable of providing advanced technical support directly to end-users in a remote

environment while maintaining exceptional customer service standards.

Key Responsibilities

? Advanced Troubleshooting & Escalation: Serve as the final point of escalation for

high-priority and complex technical issues, including server, network, cloud, and security

i
.

? ConnectWise Stack Mastery: Utilize and administer the full suite of ConnectWise

solutions, including:

? ConnectWise Manage (CW PSA): Perform advanced service board

management, workflow automation, reporting, and agreement/billing checks.

? ConnectWise Automate (CW RMM): Develop, deploy, and maintain advanced

automation scripts, monitor system health, and ensure effective remote

management of client endpoints.

? ConnectWise Control/ScreenConnect: Provide secure and efficient remote

support and assistance.

? Tool Management & Administration:

? Onboarding ConnectWise (Continuum/Kaseya Integration): Execute and

manage client and device onboarding processes effectively.

? Auvik: Administer, troubleshoot, and leverage Auvik for advanced network

monitoring and documentation.



? Security & Patch Management: Oversee and execute patch management

strategies. Administer and troubleshoot Bitdefender endpoint security solutions.

? Cyber Remediation: Lead and execute procedures for Cyber Remediation

following security i
.

? Backup & Disaster Recovery: Manage and perform advanced recovery

operations using Axciant 360 recovery solutions.



? Client Support: Deliver professional, timely, and effective technical support to end-

users via phone,
, and ticketing system, ensuring high first-call resolution rates for

Level 2 issues.

? Documentation & Training: Create and maintain detailed technical documentation,

knowledge base articles, and provide mentorship/training to lower-level technicians.

Required Skills and Qualifications

? 5+ years of progressive experience in an IT support role, with at least 3 years in an

MSP environment at a Level 2 or equivalent capacity.

? Expert-level proficiency with the entire ConnectWise stack (Manage, Automate,

Control, Onboarding ConnectWise).

? Demonstrable expertise in ConnectWise PSA (CW Manage) and ConnectWise RMM

(CW Automate) administration and scripting.

? Proven experience with Auvik network management and monitoring.

? In-depth knowledge of security products, specifically Bitdefender and experience with

security response/remediation tools like Cyber Remediation.

? Strong understanding of backup and disaster recovery solutions, including experience

with Axciant 360 recovery.

? Extensive experience with Microsoft server operating systems (Windows Server

2016/2019/2022), Active Directory, Group Policy, and Microsoft 365/Azure

administration.

? Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to explain complex

technical issues to non-technical users.

Work Environment

? This is a fully remote position.

? Requires a dedicated, quiet home office space and reliable high-speed internet

connection.

? Must be willing to participate in an on-call rotation for after-hours support as needed.
salary: Depends on the Level you will be hired

title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (GEO/AEO)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the perfect fit and you meet the qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagyn70NlQQGtKUtK/form



Note: Only applications submitted via the above link will be considered.



---

We’re hiring an SEO & AI Search Specialist to grow organic visibility and revenue across traditional search and AI-driven answer engines. You’ll own strategy and execution for our Shopify stores—
 and 
—covering technical SEO, content, entity/structured data, link acquisition, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)—earning inclusion and citations in Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, Perplexity, and ChatGPT/Gemini.



You’re excited because you will...



Strategy & Ownership

- Build and execute an integrated SEO + GEO roadmap tied to revenue for priority categories (sheet sets, duvet covers, quilts, decorative pillows).

- Define and track a query set for SERPs and AI answers; report share-of-voice and citation/inclusion rate in AI Overviews/answer engines.



On-Site & Technical

- Audit and improve site architecture, internal linking, faceted navigation, canonicals, and crawl budget for Shopify.

- Elevate Core Web Vitals and image optimization for PDPs/PLPs.

- Implement and maintain JSON-LD schema (Product, Offer, Review, Breadcrumb, Organization, FAQ, ImageObject) to strengthen entity understanding.



Content & Entity Building

- Create entity-first, evidence-backed content answer engines trust: buyer’s guides, comparisons, FAQs, care/how-to, sizing explainers, collection hubs.

- Ensure product attribute completeness (materials, thread count, fill, sizes, care, style) so AI systems can recommend or cite our pages.

- Collaborate with brand/editorial to publish on-brand copy optimized for humans and LLMs.



GEO-Specific Initiatives

- Test AI Overview/answer inclusion tactics (structured data, Q&A blocks, citations, author/entity pages, first-party images).

- Monitor and improve brand citation rate in answers for commercial and informational intents.

- Manage AI crawler permissions and robots directives (GPTBot, Perplexity, CommonCrawl) with Engineering/IT.



Off-Site & Authority

- Build a white-hat digital PR/backlink program with home & design publications, blogs, and partner sites.

- Strengthen E-E-A-T signals (author bios, brand story, policies, reviews/UGC, press mentions).



Analytics & Experimentation

- Run experiments; measure impact in GA4 & GSC with dashboards (Looker Studio).

- Prepare periodic reports and present insights and next steps to stakeholders.



90-Day Success

- Baseline audits completed (technical, content, entities, AI answer presence) and a prioritized 6-month roadmap delivered.

- Quick wins shipped: schema fixes, internal linking improvements, attribute completeness for top SKUs/collections, and one entity-driven content hub launched.

- GEO scorecard established (priority queries, inclusion/citation rate, answer snippets captured, supporting pages).



6–12 Month Outcomes

- Material growth in non-brand organic revenue and category rankings.

- Sustained inclusion/citation in AI answers for target queries across core categories.

- Repeatable GEO playbook embedded in content and merchandising workflows.



Job Requirements

- Proven SEO chops in eCommerce (preferably Shopify) with measurable revenue impact.

, Slack, Zoom, and phone.

HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding, linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate customers' lives through beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.

title: Shopify Store Specialist
description:
HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please fill out the application form: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagwn3KJ9biX7VeNO/form



Given the high volume of applicants, we will not be able to consider applications not submitted through this form. Thank you for your understanding!



POSITION DETAILS: SHOPIFY STORE SPECIALIST



MISSION:

To drive E-commerce sales growth through proactive E-commerce account management, including timely and accurate listing management and optimization, digital storefront optimization, and marketing campaign ideation and execution, with the ultimate goal of creating a thriving and sustainable online business that meets the evolving needs of our diverse customer base.



KEY OUTCOMES:

* Product Setup: Efficiently set up new products on assigned accounts according to agreed-upon listing standards, ensuring a 99.8% upload rate.



* Store Optimization: Within the first 6 months, boost our store's conversion rate to the industry average of 2.0%



* Record Maintenance: Maintain 100?curacy in Airtable record-keeping and weekly KPI report tracking.



* Inventory Feeds: Achieve 99?curacy in inventory feed uploads and maintain timely inventory updates, with no more than one error per quarter; do periodic spot checks of >10 items on each platform per week to verify site accuracy



* MAPP Adherence: Maintain 100% compliance with the company's MAPP; violations resolved within 72 hours



* New Ideas: Implement >2 major new ideas per quarter to improve account performance through a mix of competitor research and the latest Shopify/eCom sales strategies



OTHER REGULAR RESPONSIBILITIES:

* SOP Creation and Maintenance: Update/maintain SOPs that encompass the product setup process, store optimization, and more.



* Performance Analysis and Reporting: Every week, analyze sales and other KPIs to understand site performance, identify areas for improvement, and inform data-driven decision-making. Investigate any unexplained fluctuations and collaborate with customers to resolve issues when necessary.



* Cross-functional Collaboration: Monitor daily order flow and collaborate with internal teams such as Customer Service and Marketing to resolve issues and ensure a seamless and integrated approach to store management.



* Market Research: Keep tabs on competitor strategies to inform listing strategy and overall account strategy.



* Promotions and Discounts: Develop and manage promotional campaigns to drive sales, increase customer retention, and enhance brand visibility.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:

* Organized home office setup, free of noise and distractions, with a dual monitor setup strongly preferred.



* Reliable power and internet connections, with backup systems in place.



* Full-time position, 40 hrs/week minimum, with partial overlapping hours or entirely overlapping hours with US Central time



* 2-3 years of experience with Shopify site maintenance



* 1+ years of experience with Shopify site optimization, including CRO work



* Must have substantial previous Excel experience, including experience working with flat files



* Excellent English skills



* High attention to detail, with the ability to meticulously proofread for spelling and grammar



* Ability and willingness to independently learn new tools, products, or technology and make recommendations on trends to support the business



* Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and professional with the ability to multitask and prioritize workload; ability to work independently with minimal supervision is extremely important



* Ability to work with our team via
, Slack, and
/Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion



* Stable, trustworthy, highly dependable. Ideally, someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



* Commitment to HiEnd Accents' mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



About HiEnd Accents

HiEnd Accents designs and sells premium bedding and home textiles — quilts, sheets, decorative pillows, duvets, and more — that bring everyday luxury into people's homes. We've been family-owned and operated since 2005, now in our second generation of leadership, and are headquartered in Dallas, Texas.



We serve thousands of retailers, interior designers, department stores, and boutique hotels across the United States through four distinct brands spanning a range of styles and price points. Our growth has been recognized nationally: we've been named to the Inc. 5000 (a prestigious list of America's fastest-growing private companies) two years running, and have received multiple industry awards for product excellence.



We're a company of around 45 people — small enough that every person matters, established enough that you're joining something real and growing.



Discover more at 
.



Why HiEnd Accents?

We're growing our team in the Philippines because we believe in finding the best people regardless of geography — and investing in them for the long term.



As a family-owned company, we don't treat our tea
mbers as interchangeable. We take the time to build real working relationships, we care about your professional development, and we want every person who works with us to leave with stronger skills than when they started. That's a genuine commitment from our leadership, not a line in a job posting.



Learn more about our Philippines team here: Meet the HiEnd Accents Team in the Philippines (
) 



What you can expect:

You'll work directly with our core team in Texas — not through layers of management or a BPO intermediary. Your contributions will be visible, your ideas heard, and your growth supported.



-Compensation & Benefits— Competitive pay benchmarked to PH market rates for skilled roles, not entry-level floors. Paid time off, including vacation days and holidays, plus 13th-month pay.

- Real Career Growth— We're expanding quickly, which means new roles and responsibilities open up regularly. We actively develop our people through mentorship, skill-building, and increasing ownership of projects.

-A Team That Feels Like a Team — We're a close, collaborative group that celebrates wins together. You'll know your teammates by name — including leadership.

mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.

mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later
