title: World-class DTC Video Editor (ONLY A-PLAYERS)
description:
We're looking for an exceptional video editor who doesn't just cut footage—you understand the psychology of direct-to-consumer marketing and what makes customers click "Buy Now."



This isn't a position for generalists. We need someone who lives and breathes ecommerce video, understands the nuances of VSLs (Video Sales Letters), testimonials, and ad creatives that convert cold traffic into paying customers.



What Makes You Perfect for This Role:



You have a proven track record editing high-converting video content for DTC brands, particularly in health supplements or similar direct response niches. You understand that every frame, transition, and text overlay serves a strategic purpose—building trust, creating urgency, and driving action.



You know the difference between content that looks pretty and content that sells. You've studied winning ad creatives, you understand hooks that stop the scroll, and you can craft testimonial sequences that feel authentic while hitting every psychological trigger.



You're experienced with the full spectrum of DTC video content:
/Instagram ads, YouTube pre-rolls, VSLs, advertorials, UGC-style content, and product demos. You understand pacing, music selection, subtitle styling, and the specific editing techniques that work for different platforms and audiences.



Your Experience Includes:



3+ years editing for DTC ecommerce brands (health/wellness/supplements is a major plus)

Deep portfolio of video ads that have generated significant revenue

Expertise in creating video content for audiences 50+ (understanding their viewing preferences and pain points)

Mastery of direct response video techniques: pattern interrupts, benefit stacking, social proof integration, scarcity/urgency elements

Understanding of the customer journey and how video fits into different funnel stages

Experience collaborating with copywriters and marketers to bring scripts to life



Technical Requirements:



Strong skills in After Effects for motion graphics and text animations

Ability to color grade, audio mix, and deliver broadcast-quality final products

Fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality

Experience with both short-form (15-60 second ads) and long-form (3-15 minute VSLs) content



What We're Looking For:



Someone who asks "Will this increase conversions?" not just "Does this look good?"

A student of direct response marketing who constantly analyzes what's working in the market

Excellent communication skills and ability to implement feedback quickly

Reliability and consistency—we need someone who delivers on time, every time

Proactive mindset: you spot opportunities to improve content and suggest creative solutions



Compensation & Details:



Salary: $700 - $1,000/month (negotiable based on experience and results)

Type: Full-time, remote

This is a long-term opportunity with growth potential as we scale



To Apply:

Send your portfolio showcasing your best DTC video work—specifically videos that drove measurable results. Include any data on performance (ROAS, CTR, conversion rates) if available. Tell us about the most successful video campaign you've edited and why it worked.



Note: Only apply if you're genuinely at the top of your game in DTC video editing. We're building a world-class marketing team and only want A-players who are obsessed with creating content that converts.

title: Operations Manager & HR Partner (The "Right Hand" to CEO) – High Responsibility

I need a leader who brings solutions, manages the team, and ensures that every hire adds value to the company.



You will be the bridge between my vision and the team's execution. Your goal is to free up my time so I can focus on big-picture growth while you handle the day-to-day operations and team performance.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Team Leadership & HR: Recruit, onboard, and manage a team (including Sourcing and Communications managers). You will track their KPIs and ensure they are productive.



Operations & Supply Chain: Oversee the Alibaba sourcing process. Ensure quality control, negotiate better terms with suppliers, and manage procurement timelines.



Project Management: Drive the development of e-commerce projects, website content updates, and the creation of professional product catalogs.



Strategic Reporting: Provide weekly reports on business performance, team efficiency, and project status.



Required Qualifications:



Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or Team Lead.



Deep understanding of Alibaba sourcing and supply chain management.



Experience in E-commerce (website content management, catalog creation, digital sales flow).



Expert level in project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, or Trello).



Ability to make decisions independently and "manage up" (tell me what needs to be done, don't just ask).



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, stable full-time position.



Performance-based bonuses (We reward results, not just hours).



Direct communication with the CEO.



Opportunity to help build and scale a business from the ground up.





HOW TO APPLY (Follow these instructions strictly):



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am the Leader you need for Aromika.

title: Strategic Alibaba Sourcing & Procurement Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Sourcing & Procurement Specialist to handle our supply chain operations on Alibaba. Your main goal is to find the best manufacturers, negotiate the best possible terms, and ensure that every product that leaves China meets our high-quality standards.



You will report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with the CEO.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Supplier Vetting: Identify and verify manufacturers on Alibaba (avoiding trading companies/middlemen).



Negotiation: Negotiate pricing, MOQs (Minimum Order Quantities), and payment terms (aiming for 30/70 splits via Trade Assurance).



Sample Management: Coordinate sample production and shipping to ensure they meet specifications.



Quality Control: Arrange third-party inspections and ensure all production issues are fixed before final payment.



Logistics Coordination: Work with freight forwarders to ensure timely delivery and correct documentation.



Required Qualifications:



Min 2-3 years of experience specifically in Alibaba sourcing for international markets.



Expertise in Trade Assurance, Incoterms (EXW, FOB, DDP), and factory audits.



Deep understanding of Quality Control (QC) processes.



Strong negotiation skills – you must be comfortable pushing back on suppliers to get better deals.



Highly organized with a "never trust, always verify" mindset.



Why Work With Us?



Stable, long-term full-time role.



Professional growth within a scaling e-commerce business.



Clear management structure (you will have a dedicated Operations Manager to support you).



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Master Sourcing Agent for Aromika".



List 3 specific "Red Flags" you look for when checking a new supplier's Alibaba profile.



Explain your process for handling a situation where a batch of 500 units has a 10?fect rate during inspection.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your biggest sourcing "win" (how you saved money or improved quality).

title: Operations Manager & HR Partner (The "Right Hand" to CEO)
description:
I am looking for a high-level Operations Manager / HR Partner in the Philippines to take full ownership of my business results. I am not looking for a Virtual Assistant who waits for instructions. I need a leader who brings solutions, manages the team, and ensures that every hire adds value to the company.



You will be the bridge between my vision and the team's execution. Your goal is to free up my time so I can focus on big-picture growth while you handle the day-to-day operations and team performance.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Team Leadership & HR: Recruit, onboard, and manage a team (including Sourcing and Communications managers). You will track their KPIs and ensure they are productive.



Operations & Supply Chain: Oversee the Alibaba sourcing process. Ensure quality control, negotiate better terms with suppliers, and manage procurement timelines.



Project Management: Drive the development of e-commerce projects, website content updates, and the creation of professional product catalogs.



Strategic Reporting: Provide weekly reports on business performance, team efficiency, and project status.



Required Qualifications:



Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or Team Lead.



Deep understanding of Alibaba sourcing and supply chain management.



Experience in E-commerce (website content management, catalog creation, digital sales flow).



Expert level in project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, or Trello).



Ability to make decisions independently and "manage up" (tell me what needs to be done, don't just ask).



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, stable full-time position.



Performance-based bonuses (We reward results, not just hours).



Direct communication with the CEO.



Opportunity to help build and scale a business from the ground up.





HOW TO APPLY (Follow these instructions strictly):



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am the Leader you need for Aromika.



Briefly describe a situation where you managed a team and solved a major problem without the owner’s help.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are an "A-Player" Manager, not just a VA.

title: Strategic Alibaba Sourcing & Procurement Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Sourcing & Procurement Specialist to handle our supply chain operations on Alibaba. Your main goal is to find the best manufacturers, negotiate the best possible terms, and ensure that every product that leaves China meets our high-quality standards.



You will report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with the CEO.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Supplier Vetting: Identify and verify manufacturers on Alibaba (avoiding trading companies/middlemen).



Negotiation: Negotiate pricing, MOQs (Minimum Order Quantities), and payment terms (aiming for 30/70 splits via Trade Assurance).



Sample Management: Coordinate sample production and shipping to ensure they meet specifications.



Quality Control: Arrange third-party inspections and ensure all production issues are fixed before final payment.



Logistics Coordination: Work with freight forwarders to ensure timely delivery and correct documentation.



Required Qualifications:



Min 2-3 years of experience specifically in Alibaba sourcing for international markets.



Expertise in Trade Assurance, Incoterms (EXW, FOB, DDP), and factory audits.



Deep understanding of Quality Control (QC) processes.



Strong negotiation skills – you must be comfortable pushing back on suppliers to get better deals.



Highly organized with a "never trust, always verify" mindset.



Why Work With Us?



Stable, long-term full-time role.



Professional growth within a scaling e-commerce business.



Clear management structure (you will have a dedicated Operations Manager to support you).



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Master Sourcing Agent for Aromika".



List 3 specific "Red Flags" you look for when checking a new supplier's Alibaba profile.



Explain your process for handling a situation where a batch of 500 units has a 10?fect rate during inspection.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your biggest sourcing "win" (how you saved money or improved quality).

title: Business Development Manager / Operations Architect (KPI & Team Building)
description:
Job Title: Business Development & Operations Architect (KPIs + Hiring + Systems)

The Mission:

We are a growing company with a clear vision, but we need a System Builder to create the internal engine. I am looking for a right-hand person who doesn’t just "manage" tasks but designs the organizational structure, sets the metrics for success, and hires the talent to execute it.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Organizational Design: Audit our current workflow and build a scalable team hierarchy.



KPI Management: Define, implement, and track Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for every department to ensure accountability.



Talent Acquisition: Identify gaps in our team, write job descriptions, and lead the recruitment process to hire A-players.



SOP Creation: Build a library of Standard Operating Procedures so the business can run without constant supervision.



Who You Are:



You have a proven track record of building company structures or scaling departments.



You are data-driven—you believe that if it’s not measured, it’s not managed.



You are an expert recruiter who can spot talent and culture-fit from a mile away.



You have high-level English skills and a "builder" mentality (you find solutions, not excuses).



?? PRE-INTERVIEW TEST (Follow these steps or your application will be ignored):

To ensure you have the attention to detail required for this role, please follow these instructions exactly:



Subject Line: Change your application subject to: "SYSTEM ARCHITECT - [Your Years of Management Experience]" (e.g., SYSTEM ARCHITECT - 5 Years).



The Question: In your cover letter, answer this: "If a department is underperforming, what are the first 3 metrics (KPIs) you would check to find the root cause?"



The Video: Record a 60-90 second Loom video introducing yourself and describing one specific team or system you built from scratch. (Paste the link in your application).



Tools: List the top 3 software tools you use to manage team performance and tasks.



Why Join Us?



Full-time, long-term remote position.



High level of autonomy—you design the systems.



Competitive salary based on experience and results.

title: Talent Acquisition Lead
description:
!!! Angeles (On-Site) - Women Only !!!



We are a private, fast-paced investment consultancy establishing a high-performance Conversion board in the Clark/Angeles area. We are looking for an Elite Talent Hunter to serve as our Head of Recruitment. This is not a generic BPO role. We need a partner who understands the high-stakes nature of the Financial Services and Trading sectors.



Your Mission:



Strategic Sourcing: Directly "headhunting" a specialized team of female agents with a proven track record in High-Ticket Sales, Outbound Conversions, and Client Retention.



Quality Control: Screening for "Alpha" personalities-candidates who are thick-skinned, money-motivated, and can handle the pressure of a high-velocity sales floor.



Confidential Operations: Leading the local recruitment cycle with absolute discretion, ensuring a seamless and private onboarding process.



Requirements:



Local Market Intel: Deep connections within the Clark/Angeles BPO & FinTech talent pools. (If you’ve recruited for Forex, Crypto, or Gaming/POGO-you are our ideal candidate).



On-Site Presence: Daily physical office presence in the Clark/Angeles area is mandatory.



The Profile: High-energy, authoritative, and capable of identifying "top-tier" closers in a 5-minute interview.



Loyalty: Ability to work closely with the Director in a private, high-status executive setting.
